name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Stand with Mort - Our Program Is Working!
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort_2&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **_"If you're not catching flak, you're not over the target."_** That's a classic saying in the military to let you know if you are engaging the target properly. As a former Infantry Captain in the United States Army, and now as the President of a large grassroots political organization, I know that saying well! And that's exactly what is happening to our Liberty Champion in St. Paul: Rep Erik Mortensen (Mort). **He has been politically bleeding for the cause fighting like a junkyard dog down at the Capitol. And we all owe him a BIG THANK YOU for fighting for us on the inside.** You can drop him a message on his Facebook page [**HERE**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6oiei52nUpL_6MSr3MiS1QsqD_DTOCMmXyAydABXr_1C&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort_2&n=2) and let him know you appreciate his efforts. **Now it's time to do our duty on the outside by having his back! Mort can't do it alone. He needs a large group**** _outside of St Paul to help him in his fight against the radical left agenda!_** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort_2&n=3 "SUPPORT ACTION 4 LIBERTY") [SUPPORT ACTION 4 LIBERTY](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort_2&n=4)
---
Politics is a nasty, ugly arena. Few people want to get involved because its full of cheats, liars and backstabbers. But every once in awhile, a true champion comes along who is willing to get in and protect liberty at great costs.
You know how much I talk about weak-kneed Republicans who continue to sell out on Minnesotans? Sometimes it's done publicly like when Gazelka announced a budget deal with Tim Walz. We all lost big on that!
Other times, it's done more secretly like when Republicans in the Minnesota House refused to allow a recorded roll call vote on the Never Again Bill. These traitors wanted to screw you, without anyone knowing how they voted!
Thankfully Mort was up at the Capitol willing to expose these cowards who are protecting Walz' Emergency Powers. But that made him hated inside the walls of the Capitol by The Swamp.
You'd think a couple Republicans in the New House Republican Caucus would have his back. After all, he joined them in January, growing their numbers by 25%.
But when Mort called out their "friends" in the Old Republican House Caucus for refusing to allow a roll call vote on the Never Again Bill, it immediately soured their relationships with the fakers for liberty.
**So they[kicked Mort out of their caucus](https://www.action4liberty.com/drazkowski_and_house_republicans_turn_on_liberty_champion_erik_mortensen?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort_2&n=5) to salvage the relationships with the fake conservatives who are continually blocking us from making progress in St Paul.**
Watch our interview with Mort:
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6vfYzCCxd5gSPFSCTyEpzlcJXO-XvjCL4rqYe4mPwn_nYb5A1v6FcA6tWXuTIa4GTjG3XTcLPIVt5gAs_hWiv70&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort_2&n=6)
**And this rams home the point that our efforts are working!**
**They would not kick Mort out and try sabotage the liberty movement if we were not being effective.**
It's precisely because of our program on the Never Again Bill coupled with Mort taking a stand calling these weaklings out that they pulled the rug out from under you and me.
But we're not slowing down.
In fact, we are growing larger and faster than ever thanks to your support to help us find more freedom fighters all over Minnesota.
We're getting a bad deal here in this state. The left is hell bent on ushering in socialism and eradicating our Constitutional Republic. Walz has held on to Unilateral Emergency Powers now for 433 days!
## WE'RE LOSING OUR FREEDOMS!
But with Liberty Champions like Rep Erik Mortensen going to the mat for us, the tide is turning for the cause for liberty in Minnesota.
With Mort leading the charge, it allows us to identify The Swamp and its enablers like the New House Republican Caucus.
So while many may hang their head on this news, we rejoice with a clear view of who is really fighting for us and who is standing in the way of liberty in Minnesota.
I Stand with Mort and I'm grateful that he is representing us in St Paul.
**Thanks to you, Action 4 Liberty is expanding our team and supporters every month. I can't thank you enough for your[generous support](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort_2&n=7). It means the world to us!**
Our mission is to protect liberty for the next generation. This is too important of a mission to fail!
And with your help and continued support, we will no doubt be victorious in our efforts to retain and restore our liberties.
[**Continue supporting our mission today with a donation. Let's make sure there is a large group outside of St Paul that has Mort's back!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort_2&n=8)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort_2&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort_2&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=stand_with_mort_2&n=11), software for leaders.

name: Jennifer Carroll Foy
subject: re: fwd: all eyes on us tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | | Just got finished with the debate and wanted to reup my message from earlier. Tonight voters saw there are key differences between Terry McAuliffe and me. Polling shows that we can win but only with your help.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally, Peter. Here’s the link to give now:

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_debate**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yItEt7UQpuYeCalSemnTXDFku3bS54evJefeYhzuGSucj6PnT_p1uupEDfDfgdMSsK9O8_nYVPxNsXv0JshdHWAxlQoS95EAYJ6n06NJGWlETsdaynEvsx2_WlwcvQGIXjG3GMu5mDk6U2RovIbaI-V7SEtvl_1dVFYXRhiQWDfUv_5C3D4OAMXt-H9JVBcaZ6hDJOLr09pPduQcDRFScStIon-NHw77DUBuUMeAugLmWdCL4YyVPjoi6at0jn7mshCOfAiHpr8W2S01WuDd7LhTYt0QI7KY9t9lWuJxDERPf9QEkTlhtcZ6inAAy0NtNjxTkqVCA6XjRcEx6HFAfx/3c3/rLTFpjl0QGGGs0ghRH6gdA/h0/4ag8eTWMEXIh3XmwLk35xzjCLSVogQLlbPjX9K9QmRw)

I hope to see your name pop up on the donor list tonight. And if you watched tonight’s debate, I hope I made you proud.

Jennifer

Begin forwarded message:

>
> I’m preparing for another debate tonight and I can tell you the pressure is on. Now that Republicans have selected their nominee, all eyes are on Terry McAuliffe and me. It’s a contest to see who has the upward momentum and the ability to turnout not just likely Democratic voters, but also expanding the base to take on a deep-pocketed Republican in the general election.
>
> Look, I know with the right resources I can win. The polling shows that we have a path to victory and the only thing standing in our way is the funding to execute our winning strategy.
>
> **[Like I said, this is a contest of momentum. I want to go out there confident that we have the resources in the door to keep fighting strong. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yItEt7UQpuYeCalSemnTXDFku3bS54evJefeYhzuGSucj6PnT_p1uupEDfDfgdMSsK9O8_nYVPxNsXv0JshdHWEmqF-dfIyIHVkaV1pNy3-wxrGjLOCCLdRKg_wq4C_G2atlGRlpJB1ZinTsMCgebIczXi6uk4mQCV3n309_A4Tis451pYLcN2ekwrYdw-K8y8erKvHgzqxUOhG9bdJsqKUdIUB1k50vJukfl9naKffxOm0EHdsirpgEhKJZovF0YyuEkZ2MQlhcU_8WptYv_JIgIyMLUkkRo9q6piLzdQTFHf7SJ50RH7SVseAortW7SttuhgfzYmmGWHbrfxeGY9/3c3/rLTFpjl0QGGGs0ghRH6gdA/h1/HjJz_swmZXEvOHOSWDqQxw-JKIa-Glf2EzQUVQYS_g0)**
>
> I hope I make you proud tonight. I’ll circle back with more soon!
>
> Jennifer
>
>
>
>
>
>
>
* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_Bh73lWki93nG0RUyySk6zkTRBWLykLOh_ikrEg1x5MMoF3ukeydM7KFnOxXBaaOiONXzZ10-ApJX7CjinaZlTXGMpTGbVl6kvFq7fPLUuF-9GqDTo_lGyoQXYnDJQt7OaQpD4X2iEHThNpExEkbl-0uEcmQ_WkUKHrRdhdmo3Cp4BdFh2qaBGni49l-E7pUp7c-vwmpv3rT4Tb_IBLsGtUX2_ot3mix3J55HsFdychwyBe7mAMMHQ8406ZdxCs1w/3c3/rLTFpjl0QGGGs0ghRH6gdA/h2/82rc-naDmU0b0lhsROyuqkA9Rv4QsvhC05XKlz1hOJU)**_ [CONTRIBUTE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_pXkWAZF1xX_YPR-e_nM-xsMzwmhzFMlK0z2hbrgzKa7hn_Vg1lmWQ8085ToZqoD3-9PRbSgMkRcdUkI4aQxdVyv0dNC3AJ6J57l2sRK38mZXd1vhuhSfNaTRBs9Dvqm_1_2c6BQgUYreEX0Ye5AwOcp0wZtSVhFseb5rDD14zwDBMHod03D90tugST-NCgP-dCiTB4i3Cs2uULfzBrkleIFJPz59IhQKnYgfl9POCgX617h3l3tyJ04A9ifTIHek/3c3/rLTFpjl0QGGGs0ghRH6gdA/h3/iHZ6gW5ZnPDNMH2aqFQUes4cdYDx2RqwrsCZQgfQSaY) | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor

name: John McGuigan
subject: How to make the status quo uncomfortable:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29522304/286668058/-1233952322?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThkODlkYS0zY2JhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6-rAYxq0A1A_-VdBeEmXuk8pTVWWIQu_dFHNnMPKEiE=&emci=fe4687fd-b4b9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=158d89da-3cba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356)
---

| | **Let's make some waves, Peter.** We kicked off this campaign because we want to upset the status quo, and build a government that truly serves the people it represents. Consider the Supreme Court, where politicians from both parties have failed us. **I've long supported expanding the Supreme Court, Peter – not to tilt it in favor of one party or another, but to favor the American people.** We both need and deserve a court that reflects our values and represents our interests, and getting that court starts with electing _Senators_ who reflect our values and represent our interests. **[And that's why I'm asking for a small contribution of just $6 right now—because, without it, we won't be able to take on the status quo and the established politicians who count on it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29522311/286668066/-34735242?refcode=2021-05-21-scotus&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=158d89da-3cba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThkODlkYS0zY2JhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6-rAYxq0A1A_-VdBeEmXuk8pTVWWIQu_dFHNnMPKEiE=)** Yes, Donald Trump and the Republicans packed the court. But, Senate Democrats have also let us down. Congressional Democrats have treated the Supreme Court as just another political playing field: a place to score points and win contests. But they've almost completely lost sight of the Court's connection to the American people. A few quick numbers, Peter:
* Each of the nine justices on the court stands in for _34 million_ people. (For reference: in 1869, when the court was expanded to nine, the entire population of the country was less than 39 million.)

* The nine current justices come from just three law schools: four from Harvard, four from Yale, and one from Notre Dame.

* Six of the nine justices (66%) are Catholic, compared to 22% of the population (including yours truly).

* ****And, of course, more than half of the sitting justices were appointed by presidents who lost the popular vote.****

As a result, each justice effectively rules on behalf of more people, while actually representing the views of just a select few. And now we face historic challenges to long-settled issues like the right to a safe and legal abortion, as Republicans are firmly set on overturning _Roe v. Wade_. Even basic issues of civil rights, equality, and equity are going to be contested in the Supreme Court, because the most extreme elements in our society and their politician friends in the U.S. Senate are feeling _really_ bold right now. **[Party politicians are counting on entrenched power to carry them through this election, Peter. Chip in $6 now to show them we're not going to back down.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29522316/286668074/-34735242?refcode=2021-05-21-scotus&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=158d89da-3cba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThkODlkYS0zY2JhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6-rAYxq0A1A_-VdBeEmXuk8pTVWWIQu_dFHNnMPKEiE=)** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29522318/286668076/-34735242?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2021-05-21-scotus&refcode2=158d89da-3cba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThkODlkYS0zY2JhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6-rAYxq0A1A_-VdBeEmXuk8pTVWWIQu_dFHNnMPKEiE=) | clean_body: | | | Let's make some waves, Peter. We kicked off this campaign because we want to upset the status quo, and build a government that truly serves the people it represents. Consider the Supreme Court, where politicians from both parties have failed us. I've long supported expanding the Supreme Court, Peter – not to tilt it in favor of one party or another, but to favor the American people. We both need and deserve a court that reflects our values and represents our interests, and getting that court starts with electing Senators who reflect our values and represent our interests. = Yes, Donald Trump and the Republicans packed the court. But, Senate Democrats have also let us down. Congressional Democrats have treated the Supreme Court as just another political playing field: a place to score points and win contests. But they've almost completely lost sight of the Court's connection to the American people. A few quick numbers, Peter: Each of the nine justices on the court stands in for 34 million people. (For reference: in 1869, when the court was expanded to nine, the entire population of the country was less than 39 million.) The nine current justices come from just three law schools: four from Harvard, four from Yale, and one from Notre Dame. Six of the nine justices (66%) are Catholic, compared to 22% of the population (including yours truly). **And, of course, more than half of the sitting justices were appointed by presidents who lost the popular vote. As a result, each justice effectively rules on behalf of more people, while actually representing the views of just a select few. And now we face historic challenges to long-settled issues like the right to a safe and legal abortion, as Republicans are firmly set on overturning Roe v. Wade. Even basic issues of civil rights, equality, and equity are going to be contested in the Supreme Court, because the most extreme elements in our society and their politician friends in the U.S. Senate are feeling really bold right now. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA ---|--- | This email was sent by ** McGuiganForPA P.O. That’s why I’m personally asking you to dig deep and make a donation of anything you can afford right now to help our campaign pull off a win in just 18 days. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = No, Peter, I’m not here to beg you for money. But I hope you know just how important your grassroots contribution is. It’s critical we raise the necessary resources to keep our ads running, reach voters, and get out the vote. We’ve fallen significantly behind on our fundraising in recent days, and truth be told I’m worried about our chances of winning this competitive primary. That’s why I’m asking — not begging — you to step up with a critical contribution. Will you chip in anything you can to help us hit our $5,000 goal before tomorrow night? Every voter we’re able to connect with could be the difference between winning and losing this competitive primary in 18 days. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = I’m confident that this team has what it takes to make it past the finish line. But in a race this close, we’re going to need all the help we can get to build the resources we need to win. That’s why your support is so critical right now. I can’t thank you enough. — Hala As a lifelong Virginian, Hala understands where we’ve come from and embodies the diversity of our future. She’s running for Lt. Governor because she knows we have the power to move forward together, and she knows what it’ll take to get it done. Will you pitch in to join our movement for a brighter future for all? | = | Paid for by Hala for Virginia Hala for Virginia P.O. Box 7434 Woodbridge, VA 22195 United States

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Our diversity makes us stronger
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
Maryland is an incredibly diverse state, and deserves a government that reflects its people. That’s why under my administration, I’m going to make Diversity, Equity and Inclusion a foundational element of state government.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/WhVeUDue30eXDHEDzrvLQg2?source=active [https://secure.ngpvan.com/WhVeUDue30eXDHEDzrvLQg2?source=active]My administration will create a new cabinet-level position focused on Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI). The new Secretary of DEI will be charged with three major initiatives:
1.
Promoting
diversity
in
government,
especially
leadership
positions
2.
Assessing
existing
and
proposed
state
policies
to
identify
any
biases,
disparate
impacts,
or
inadequate
attention
to
existing
inequity
3.
Developing
policies
to
promote
economic
relief
for
communities
that
have
been
structurally
denied
opportunity
I fundamentally believe that when diverse perspectives are leveraged in policymaking, better policies and outcomes are achieved. If you agree with me, then will you sign your name to endorse my plan to make Diversity, Equity and Inclusion a foundational element of state government? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/WhVeUDue30eXDHEDzrvLQg2?source=active]
>From Charlottesville to the Capitol, the forces of hatred, bigotry and division have been stoked by the former President over four long and turbulent years. Now, we have a chance to turn the page. We must make sure that we create a state and a country that is inclusive of all communities. And we must transparently address past and present wrongs, and ensure they do not continue.
No matter your race, your gender, your sexual identity, no matter what county or town you hail from, whether your community is urban, suburban, or rural, ALL of Maryland’s diverse communities will be represented in my administration.
My plan doesn’t stop there. I will also proactively combat the ill effects of policies that have created unequal outcomes and institutionalized biases. That includes addressing the ongoing effects of redlining.
To that end, I’m going to work with state-chartered community banks, local credit unions, and other community-focused lenders to provide state-backed mortgage loans to communities of color. My goal will be to create parity in new homeownership rates by the end of my first term -- with an explicit focus on historically disinvested communities.
Our diversity makes us stronger -- and Maryland’s communities deserve a state government that fully embraces that ideal. Today, I am asking you to stand with me in the effort to create a more inclusive state for all. Click here to add your name to support my plan to make Diversity, Equity and Inclusion a foundational element of state government. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/WhVeUDue30eXDHEDzrvLQg2?source=active]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em052121]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b836f717-76b9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed/98015b38-45ba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODAxNWIzOC00NWJhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Efe-pbdsEco1e0SgmCopLF_jzVxz7NFX0VnccaJHB5M=&id=136194660 .

Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Until we ALL can vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

102 years ago today, the House passed the 19th Amendment, granting women the right to vote. This was a huge victory for equality and democracy -- but not for every American.

It wasn't until nearly half a century later that Congress guaranteed the voting rights of Black, brown, and Indigenous men _and_ women. These necessary and overdue voter protections only came about with the passage of the Voting Rights Act of 1965. Sadly, the Supreme Court gutted these protections in 2013.

Today, we are seeing a rise in discriminatory voter identification laws, reductions in the number of polling locations, and restrictions on voting methods across the country. And all of these voter suppression tactics disproportionately harm voters of color, seniors, and young people.

**[Peter, we need to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to restore the integrity of the original Voting Rights Act. On today's anniversary, add your name if you agree we need to expand voting rights.](https://act.myngp.com/el/njHWSIn2-zTaVUyNHPt0smhGic88PJvaDrS_0yaRzxQ=/s7jhkSMPAz70RVM8g0JNh5BUzoKctpByAwcO0e5ja0k=?gpsid=50_115_18967&ms=em21_210521_19amen_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210521_19amen_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210521_19amen_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Until we ALL can vote,

Team Kilmer

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/njHWSIn2-zTaVUyNHPt0smhGic88PJvaDrS_0yaRzxQ=/ex7hMclo26auNWD9Mrlbz8W6ZB0isho8O-bc3DGe45w=?gpsid=50_115_18968&refcode=em21_210521_19amen_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210521_19amen_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

body:
| | | Last night was another debate and I wanted to reup my message from earlier in the day. Voters saw there are key differences between Terry McAuliffe and me. Polling shows that we can win but only with your help.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally, Peter. Here’s the link to give now:

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_debate**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yItEt7UQpuYeCalSemnTXDFku3bS54evJefeYhzuGSucj6PnT_p1uupEDfDfgdMSsK9O8_nYVPxNsXv0JshdHWAxlQoS95EAYJ6n06NJGWlETsdaynEvsx2_WlwcvQGIUCIUHLHZUFMpenFhQgCJUvpOotC_PJYhKX0KTfCCUqQQijC8G_xctP50NAxi6O9YCR40tT3ZK-7X7ARf2Z-hmiF02DvY1YQNhqimjdvH2bf7Nwp8KMZjqFJXr2WsoLR_f02VIZtGVPzGzgTd-4fDnHQE8phFhAhw6ryidnpcA49Yp8QxHSX6CyZ1ydmP-NegThAg8GPM0NhKSIHV4UaMXb/3c3/jkJZO8voQU68Vq41LliRXQ/h0/OxYAQZaqohoSfvOjW79RKRXC-gn7Hc5fwsjeRPWjq7w)

I hope to see your name pop up on the donor list. And if you watched last night's debate, I hope I made you proud.

Jennifer

Begin forwarded message:

>
> I’m preparing for another debate tonight and I can tell you the pressure is on. Now that Republicans have selected their nominee, all eyes are on Terry McAuliffe and me. It’s a contest to see who has the upward momentum and the ability to turnout not just likely Democratic voters, but also expanding the base to take on a deep-pocketed Republican in the general election.
>
> Look, I know with the right resources I can win. The polling shows that we have a path to victory and the only thing standing in our way is the funding to execute our winning strategy.
>
> **[Like I said, this is a contest of momentum. I want to go out there confident that we have the resources in the door to keep fighting strong. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yItEt7UQpuYeCalSemnTXDFku3bS54evJefeYhzuGSucj6PnT_p1uupEDfDfgdMSsK9O8_nYVPxNsXv0JshdHWEmqF-dfIyIHVkaV1pNy3-wxrGjLOCCLdRKg_wq4C_G3G5R9opb8OzKQpxrSjpH72PqkzDaU5j7lKxNFvAUONTRfl5IPFOfLzzbSwcDuqGN0XDgM-DN_0PUkfL0np0PVqV1tYgu_6GbKUQVM6d-8ThCBUGrLL71w00xukJLNA-kmqJxDtXUuqOOMKUiVQCazUxXTMTK_3g-V86T39mq0WFLbEOstG0PF1b_q6wY-E3lnsYmJbYyBNBoLb4jvR9adu/3c3/jkJZO8voQU68Vq41LliRXQ/h1/7e41jCnyIT_iCkpU-zhIJ-rDWbhdN6mhQDmCGUsvRiU)**
>
> I hope I make you proud tonight. I’ll circle back with more soon!
>
> Jennifer
>
>
>
>
>
>
>
* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. name: Emily Cupples
subject: Lee's Broken Bridges
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEAT BILL LEE, PAC
body:
Peter
Recently, the lives of Western Tennessee families and the entire state's economy was disrupted when Arkansas discovered the "New Bridge" in Memphis was broken, BUT this isn't the only bridge broken in our state. In 2017, Tennessee's Department of Transportation identified 962 roads and bridges in desperate need. Under Bill Lee's leadership, we're already a decade behind and over a billions over budget on these projects.
Tennessee needs nearly $60 billion worth of infrastructure improvements and upgrades right now. And rather than working with leadership in Washington DC, Lee has partnered with fringe conservative allies Sen. Marsha Blackburn and Sen. Bill Haggerty to further cripple Tennessee families and not accept Biden's American Jobs Plan. This plan would send billions to Tennessee for needed infrastructure improvements like clean drinking water, housing, manufacturing and more than $2 billion for roads and bridges. So, why are Lee, Blackburn, and Haggerty refusing to accept much needed federal aid? Because they only care about the dark money interest groups funding their million dollar campaigns.
Tennessee families deserve and need leaders who will build bridges across the partisan divides; not public servants who break bridges every chance they get. Like we said last week, we literally cannot afford another four years of Bill Lee’s continued destruction.
$5, $10, $100, every cent counts and goes towards stopping Bill Lee, Marsha Blackburn, Bill Haggerty, and every single lawmaker breaking bridges and promises in our state. Will you join us by making a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beatbilllee]
Let's build bridges,
- Emily C. Cupples, Beat Bill Lee PAC Director

Folks, when it comes to taking action on the escalating climate crisis, we need to be bold. This week Martin led his colleagues in introducing the _Electrifying America’s Future_ resolution. It lays out a vision for electrifying our homes and businesses that will create millions of good-paying jobs in New Mexico and around the country, cut the costs of energy bills, make our air more breathable, improve public health at large, and move us closer to addressing our climate crisis with the urgency it deserves. [**More than 100 organizations and nonprofits are on board with Martin’s newest proposal to take bold climate action. Will you join them by adding your name in support of saving our planet and creating millions of jobs?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29532000/286705038/-2123435775?refcode=MTH_em_20210521_X_ENG_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_TH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2QwYTJjNy00ZmJhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSJ0D3WFZ9AGr3gzsnvx7IoH_WqLEhGY3V63F4Aynbw=&emci=19d0a2c7-4fba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1cd0a2c7-4fba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045) | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29532001/286705039/-2123435775?refcode=MTH_em_20210521_X_ENG_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_TH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2QwYTJjNy00ZmJhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSJ0D3WFZ9AGr3gzsnvx7IoH_WqLEhGY3V63F4Aynbw=&emci=19d0a2c7-4fba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1cd0a2c7-4fba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)

To save our planet, we must act on climate change _immediately_. **And that’s not an exaggeration.**
The _Electrifying America’s Future_ resolution will help New Mexico and our country move forward. It lays out a plan for widespread electrification of appliances and machines in American homes and businesses — among the most immediate, actionable ways we can take on climate change.
[**Add your name to our petition in support of Electrifying America’s Future and taking bold climate action.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29532002/286705040/-2123435775?refcode=MTH_em_20210521_X_ENG_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_TH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2QwYTJjNy00ZmJhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XSJ0D3WFZ9AGr3gzsnvx7IoH_WqLEhGY3V63F4Aynbw=&emci=19d0a2c7-4fba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1cd0a2c7-4fba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)

name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA SUPPORTS DECISION TO UNSEAL AND REVIEW FULTON COUNTY BALLOTS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, MAY 21, 2021
GREATER GEORGIA SUPPORTS DECISION TO UNSEAL AND REVIEW FULTON COUNTY BALLOTS
ATLANTA - Today, Superior Court Judge Brian Amero ruled that absentee ballots in Fulton County may be unsealed and examined for possible fraud. Greater Georgia supports this ruling, and we [look forward](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pjz0QdfXDUNNKiQ5wlonbM85TJXT5dV4npKwXU_AIvlmTLOt_CfaFSJw3N29gN5gGZ4zq50ZO6suIWTJK8-xMb9QGJQc5huB1JUTaVJJ1tTycoWcGlYwObY7Ln9_VYr0MZ5wfNQsyhoD7FMNCfS7_Lzw2m-INXr8sXu0SpZN14F1Y7YjyIzXhleCAO6e9lcEMvJncYOnkb5ZY8lwfs61ie8FdD2nvWgQglevQDldKzcDeoNcmlCsFg==&c=4aBCZwplIUpEYyKIjApwlYZHPEV_CGbGMZqcV3Llye8dJM5Hsdeqgw==&ch=5N23IJvZ8JDNx0JcoE-1FhT6_WIgrQHa5Xosd4E10n9cMHIBfwCPbA==&jrc=1) to the findings of the inspection. As previously [reported](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pjz0QdfXDUNNKiQ5wlonbM85TJXT5dV4npKwXU_AIvlmTLOt_CfaFdJCrMCty_gOOdLOm7NrS1ch9j2ltEREuBSfxnSLOg5ZgSmZyOXR31ydTcpyjfAZtemwUgZr1VaP34oc0GXPkMM6E1NFX5q9a1nyt0B-68LaZRE6dt7DZ8S2Xka-fLJghq6wTeugPFmrTEuknjofneaaDozLJs3BSZoSIsCt-sWmZfb3WHYhXjihBdEGTfgVd7pUipjz17Wrgf1o-ekWpe0NQa1ueFwbhx6VK8MAGjGIkyg9JqMSOto=&c=4aBCZwplIUpEYyKIjApwlYZHPEV_CGbGMZqcV3Llye8dJM5Hsdeqgw==&ch=5N23IJvZ8JDNx0JcoE-1FhT6_WIgrQHa5Xosd4E10n9cMHIBfwCPbA==&jrc=1) by the Atlanta Journal-Constitution, Garland Favorito, a voting-integrity advocate and government watchdog, filed the suit in Fulton County to determine the extent of any possible wrongdoing. Greater Georgia issued the following statement of support for this effort:
"Voter confidence in our election system is the bedrock of our republic. Unfortunately, inconsistencies in Fulton County's November 2020 absentee ballots cast serious doubt on voters' faith in our elections. An independent investigation even [characterized](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pjz0QdfXDUNNKiQ5wlonbM85TJXT5dV4npKwXU_AIvlmTLOt_CfaFejiTuRj754wDEcAo63x9nBZsNIIyMWQ5-CwrC21sqshcqh93pBBvRhCx2dFpSlIWK8jjLctfeEk9R0xyKa7s_kYuxb0YA8J3a3L4ReZivWO6pCgtOUikz3PnJGz_9qS6BlZ0peqFAxrQLKWL4sXuRT2F9fGJMIxqUH1M6Y5L5j0qNoZWZSL0WpGimJLAXlC77yjroVn04YSe2ybAlQBVJ7jXe2dj6IJSehC7w_LLADvkYFQiz2JZMHMwgzea0httw==&c=4aBCZwplIUpEYyKIjApwlYZHPEV_CGbGMZqcV3Llye8dJM5Hsdeqgw==&ch=5N23IJvZ8JDNx0JcoE-1FhT6_WIgrQHa5Xosd4E10n9cMHIBfwCPbA==&jrc=1) Fulton County's absentee ballot handling as 'generally bad management,'" said Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "While there is a dire need to investigate a number of other well-documented issues, we must also inspect Fulton County's absentee ballots to reassure Georgians that their voices are heard and their votes are counted. The integrity of future elections is critical, and Judge Amero's decision is a helpful step in restoring transparency, accountability, and voter confidence. We look forward to the findings and their role in promoting transparency and rebuilding faith in our elections."
---
| ###
Media Contact: [press@greatergeorgia.com](mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com)
---
| | |
---
| Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=62d967cb7a1b4676856b6bcfe7e4cc7e&_e=EHOhN0PsHmvyh6nxtyolpCO-EjP8yUO6l2d6QYgwwo4ATk1R01JgngwC87m4GezuFo53jCU-vRAVWQ2qpC5GDV4j7zdZkWQrfp7igbRuf2qehrQCF9z1Bh5ppnXtTWHA2AAW3uI5L32sWCjAYNYHvZXXPhGZdYzqpiHHL8ooxcsqEWhVHA_jJhofK8a-O6SWowj9prV_gYHzx2ftitQdPbi6D-FmjKcMxGHNhArGRBXiSWauCNiyPTYfnIFvxHmCuPP_mUYW_rslG5UY6SlWP8bVtZrPrLc8jqTw5I3ZFFg%3D) **Dear Pelosi: Open Congress 🔓****
** There’s such a thing as necessary precaution, and then there’s insanity. The Democrats’ COVID restrictions look a lot like the latter. And I’ve had enough. That’s why I wrote a letter [urging](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=62d967cb7a1b4676856b6bcfe7e4cc7e&_e=EHOhN0PsHmvyh6nxtyolpN7Zq37FCUh3v9Ylj-tdyQNRAus9M_g6ro9pbpCawQc94P0L_B1VVJ3n_EhF5wD2tGCRTQ41qufg1pngrTb82qqDnR1UyrrCpjUCsNB5K0al8tlxqIQ8bnFF1Va7h80pIpfZzpmq5HhOjfQFe_TYCQu4PxsUpWsB3ur8-GnVAtcoy8eJlNBDXzmpLB4ub8xzNZx8VuXp0HorT09NgGcqhhOBWGVViUBlulVorlQSYav7NiiOVmS2Vy0dt280NAw4AL1bWsdGCqs5dmfxEbyph0bnyJsdbb7chKxSi9bmZCmDetbf-qWLTPxcty-WWiKKHjlUVFcBupt2NlRyTbWT_2HTvLeJRuzKsbpA_iGxqQRQ) Nancy Pelosi to remove all COVID-19 restrictions in the U.S. House of Representatives. The Speaker’s strict COVID-19 restrictions are no longer necessary given the CDC’s new [guidelines](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=62d967cb7a1b4676856b6bcfe7e4cc7e&_e=EHOhN0PsHmvyh6nxtyolpLSPicxiVUx2Asogy7ro9zcXJ5y_GNjBQtYUjB9-aaFYGYhlFhIi0PZIl-ndWecIVVD-waXcVZYwg-sUIppNFk69N7rjFohHJssB_AUB-D4R7wHdOEGbiKJZdKKBZ-XU4hPxkPzqlghAk00qOHUsPlzq0jgY2YxCNgod_6mXy8wFpx8OeRcnLOaQEcKw_s_UhvaOWN2EB-70u74SkSLw3jZ2X4WHWmDc13imbHNxwOMQI0aITmCZMJcYA7YV3ciEGDOcELT5Jb0B50-57pb-qEZmQleeQkIRN2IqI1l6uvW-T4L9DiNNixicm2DCORr-xg%3D%3D) on masks, and they’re getting in the way of members doing their jobs. There’s no reason your elected officials can’t meet in person, vote in person, and do their jobs – just like the American people elected them to do. I’ve asked Speaker Pelosi to eliminate proxy voting, virtual committee hearings, and the Capitol’s mask mandate. It’s just common sense. Over the last year, the Left turned the pandemic into a political issue, shutting down businesses, keeping kids out of school, and shaming folks who didn’t live up to their triple-mask standard – even though the science didn’t support these overly restrictive measures. With COVID cases at their [lowest](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=62d967cb7a1b4676856b6bcfe7e4cc7e&_e=EHOhN0PsHmvyh6nxtyolpLnD2pw8WgsVDA56QnhoN0yxHYzGe4fhyk2exaQecmd6xmQUJU4lOm58eD7tgDafB_Nw2sqrsU6uY4RpT_yEiELC3xqodfIgKweYk_5E45erYXt3hzJexNY_uQuaCI7Yr_0-JOExOXN0iYIRrCiQrCYE3w95Gi7y0Rp5i25nGLGAs0LJC3RLnxNdwtQt0Eu5WTpTelBdBr9kDqBBnR0ASo_zoPsFVZUEIXVEnmRHcGxSdJChxC08SPY3dwdjOoDxrPHgzKzIPC1t8L8rE0gD4bRZfWoAoRDKeWmVWa_rnVMG-YENbUcXl3oMa87AXvQ7Kw%3D%3D) in nearly a year and widespread [accessibility](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=62d967cb7a1b4676856b6bcfe7e4cc7e&_e=EHOhN0PsHmvyh6nxtyolpLnD2pw8WgsVDA56QnhoN0yEeeq5QVXBRQl_yhCJ8aopzyTWwIgnu6WBiT11NphYMXBhIK4xbWr3K_a74NlgNVZOpYwRmIsp9e-DXZMmPPMpah4URKPAnqElwj29tkqPt4EZDwbKmmH_6XsUSRMFygYppGzqD3XNDFuAU-mK1D3d9iW_7xmeAD1z84oyeOILaWqGM7S2FFkUmLD3Qb8_a5gK4-j7PTGowSrStInmmLoEMSwAC3YPwBIJdm4nO7vw-86Am7K2YZqePh8iWsTudJDDYc4Vr7ZkJpITfjPHMVHPvWRYXqvkWmeIpecDLi3Duw%3D%3D) to the vaccine, our country should be well on the way to reopening. It’s time to get back to work, back to life, and back to freedom. → **Read more:** Pelosi says masks to stay on House floor despite CDC guidance ([_Los Angeles Times_](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=62d967cb7a1b4676856b6bcfe7e4cc7e&_e=EHOhN0PsHmvyh6nxtyolpO9i9zNQLNnFkKBjWYcQR2GDqlBnggbEX58fk406_4q9q16sklKrEPPh0rq42CT7nV_icJfcfH8S7ntrP5PX7wOUuY_zbcmQAVR17qi6bdZF_Wcl4Dca0oSONcHjmJ1mbm00FZjlkRx_0C4KrGGKYORg3JWlLB4A_jX4btTuorEtgomrSYJ6j4rAUEe0IwYuCQR4JikLUPthZPCMiXUCyJ1oqilKoAeYBqmIaJhfQzgyQnL1BLS6e2YuVOohSwkzfnvKTAs8iJPSB-_utey_-8dDy2bO7MQ4PR4tOPLB8c02bAZN_HeMD2k24jRl4gTu5Q%3D%3D)) | |

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. Dear Pelosi: Open Congress 🔓 There’s such a thing as necessary precaution, and then there’s insanity. The Democrats’ COVID restrictions look a lot like the latter. And I’ve had enough. That’s why I wrote a letter Nancy Pelosi to remove all COVID-19 restrictions in the U.S. House of Representatives. The Speaker’s strict COVID-19 restrictions are no longer necessary given the CDC’s new on masks, and they’re getting in the way of members doing their jobs. There’s no reason your elected officials can’t meet in person, vote in person, and do their jobs – just like the American people elected them to do. I’ve asked Speaker Pelosi to eliminate proxy voting, virtual committee hearings, and the Capitol’s mask mandate. It’s just common sense. Over the last year, the Left turned the pandemic into a political issue, shutting down businesses, keeping kids out of school, and shaming folks who didn’t live up to their triple-mask standard – even though the science didn’t support these overly restrictive measures. With COVID cases at their in nearly a year and widespread to the vaccine, our country should be well on the way to reopening. name: Laura Loomer
subject: The Jihad “Squad” in Congress
body:
I'm a patriot running for Congress because I absolutely love our nation and the principles we stand for, but more importantly . . .
| | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Laura Loomer for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)**.
---

---
| [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)
Patriot,

My name is Laura Loomer.

I'm a patriot running for Congress because I absolutely love our nation and the principles we stand for, but more importantly . . .
**. . . I am sick of the disgusting anti-American conduct of the "Squad" of Jihadists who have invaded Congress. I'm talking about Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez among others.**
I'm writing you today to ask for your support. [**Will you make a donation to help me get to Washington to take on Omar, Tlaib and AOC?**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)

Even [**a small donation would really be appreciated**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg) and help me make a big impact!

During my career as an investigative journalist, I have been banned by Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Paypal, Uber, Lyft and even had my online-banking terminated . . . all because I tell the truth about socialist, radical Democrats!
[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)
As I talk to Americans around the nation, I get the same question again and again from patriots, "How can we have members of Congress who openly support terrorist organizations like Omar and Tlaib? How can we stop them?"

And my answer is always this, "It's because politicians desperately fear being labeled 'racist' or an 'Islamophobe' if they dare say anything critical about the Squad. Omar, Tlaib and AOC have to be challenged EVERY DAY by someone who doesn't fear them."
[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)
As a journalist, I've never backed down from asking tough questions in hostile conditions:
* AOC has literally run down a street to avoid me when I asked her to denounce Hamas.

* When I confronted Ilhan Omar about violating immigration laws by marrying her own brother, she had me surrounded by angry supporters as she slithered away.

* Rashida Tlaib violently reacted when I asked about her support for a terrorist group.

* Even Hillary Clinton was stunned when I tracked her down at a book-signing and asked her where her missing Benghazi emails were!

Those few bullet points are just a few examples of my "interactions" with the socialist elites in Washington. [**And that 's why I'm asking you to help me win my race. Put me in Congress and every single day that the House is in session, I will confront the anti-American, anti-Christian and anti-Jewish politicians who have infected Washington.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)
**When you donate to my campaign, you 're making a 25X impact. Each $1 you donate pays for the materials my campaign needs to reach 25 Americans!**

[**👉 A $10 donation helps me reach 250 voters!**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)
[**👉 A $35 donation helps me reach 857 voters!**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)
[**👉 A $60 donation helps me reach 1,500 voters!**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)
[**👉 A $100 donation helps me reach 2,500 voters!**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)
As a conservative, Jewish woman who has spent years taking on the anti-American left, I've been called every name in the book.

The Fake News Media can't write an article about me without insinuating I'm a racist or a white supremacist - **which is ridiculous!**

When Facebook banned me in 2019, they released a statement calling me a "DANGEROUS INDIVIDUAL."

And I am dangerous.

**I 'm dangerous to the socialist, jihadist agenda.**

But let me tell you why that is:
* I exposed terrorist enablers within the ranks of the leftist, National Women's March, throwing the leadership into chaos. Alyssa Milano was probably shocked to hear that she was in league with women who openly hated Jews and Christians while supporting terror-tied groups.
* You may have heard the story about Ilhan Omar violating immigration laws by marrying her own brother. That was my investigative work that backed it up and first exposed it. Oh, and she also committed student loan fraud by claiming her own brother as her spouse. Omar spent much of her 2020 campaign answering questions about the issues I brought to the public arena.

[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)
* I have led the fight against social media bias and censorship of conservative voices. I created #StoptheBias and hold social media billionaires accountable for their anti-American actions. I have repeatedly exposed Facebook and Twitter, confronting the Twitter CEO directly. I've also filed several lawsuits against the tech giants.
* And I've even rounded up illegal aliens and took them to Nancy Pelosi's California mansion to bring awareness to the Americans who have been murdered by criminal illegals. We literally setup a tent on her front lawn and hung pictures of those slain Americans so that media outlets around the world could see the devastating impact of illegal immigration.

[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)
Those are just a few moments from my career that I wanted to share with you to prove this point:
**I am not and will never be afraid to take a stand for my conservative values.
And I will never be shamed into silence!**
Everything I have done has been as a private citizen. Imagine the impact I can make as a member of Congress, and [**I ask that you help me get there today by supporting my Congressional campaign**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg).

Every day, my campaign is gaining momentum [**but I need your help**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg).
[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)
Let's face reality. Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib and the rest of the Jihad Squad in Washington are a threat to our nation. Their unabashed goal is to turn every city in America into London, where Jews and Christians are afraid to walk down the street due to the Islamic takeover.

They want an America that bows down to their beliefs.

**And now, they HAVE an America that silences anyone who challenges their radical agenda.**

Well, not quite.

[**I 'm still here despite their best efforts, and I'm counting on you to help fund my efforts to reach millions of Americans just like you.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg) **And remember, each dollar you donate makes a 25 TIMES impact!
With [every dollar that you can contribute, I can reach another 25 Americans](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg) to build a base of support that will help me win in 2022!
Are you in?**
By sending me to Washington as a member of Congress, you're not just sending an effective voice to take on the squad of Jihadists in Washington, you're starting a ripple effect that will turn the tide.

Facebook and Twitter didn't ban me because I'm crazy or spent my day spreading fake news.

**They banned me because I was the most dangerous threat to their beloved socialist politicians.**

But they can't ban me from Congress, so [**I urge you to join me as I fight my way to Washington**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg).

[**Donate as much as you can today**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg), and over the next few days as you visit with friends, colleagues and family, smile and let them know that you sent a campaign contribution to the most dangerous woman in America, Laura Loomer.

Thank you so much for taking the time to read this lengthy letter, and thank you in advance for all that you do.

With respect and sincerity,

Laura Loomer Candidate for Congress

P.S. As May comes to an end, I have to close out the month as strong as possible. The Fake News media pours over my fundraising reports, and if I don't continually show progress, liberal reporters will tear me apart. [**So please donate today so we don 't give them any ammunition against me.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)
[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/aaMsgE1eA1WHJdDPj892rrng/AQYPzRafD892l2ICRvew2Frg)

name: Team Sarah
subject: Help us make HERstory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter,

Here are some stats about women in the Senate you need to see:
* Women make up less than 1⁄4 of the Senate.
* Tammy Baldwin is Wisconsin's first female senator, elected in 2012.
* Seventeen states have never elected a female senator.
* No state has ever elected more than three women to the Senate in total.

**It's time to change these stats, and Sarah is the candidate to make it happen.[Wisconsin has never elected two female senators before -- will you help us make it a reality? Chip in $5 so we have the resources we need to make history.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29536022/286714468/-382700568?gpsid=50_130_19013&refcode=em21_210521_Women_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210521_Women_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmQxOTA3ZS01NmJhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5UEiv8Wn9WErxp81EibNAX0yUtaL0pPQL_4F5kRpEUg=)**

Senator Tammy Baldwin has been an incredible advocate for Wisconsin families, and she deserves a partner in the Senate who shares that commitment. That senator is NOT Ron Johnson. Instead of fighting for hard-working families, Ron Johnson stalled the passage of COVID relief and tax breaks for families, has put corporations and wealthy CEOs ahead of workers, and called the January 6th insurrection on our Capitol a "peaceful protest."

As a working mom, Sarah knows how much the delays in relief hurt Wisconsin families. As senator, she'll never pull the kind of stunts Ron Johnson does. **Instead, she'll get stuff done -- because that's what women do.**

**[It's long past time we had two women in charge. clean_body: Peter, Here are some stats about women in the Senate you need to see: Women make up less than 1⁄4 of the Senate. Tammy Baldwin is Wisconsin's first female senator, elected in 2012. Seventeen states have never elected a female senator. No state has ever elected more than three women to the Senate in total. It's time to change these stats, and Sarah is the candidate to make it happen.= Senator Tammy Baldwin has been an incredible advocate for Wisconsin families, and she deserves a partner in the Senate who shares that commitment. That senator is NOT Ron Johnson. Instead of fighting for hard-working families, Ron Johnson stalled the passage of COVID relief and tax breaks for families, has put corporations and wealthy CEOs ahead of workers, and called the January 6th insurrection on our Capitol a "peaceful protest." As a working mom, Sarah knows how much the delays in relief hurt Wisconsin families. As senator, she'll never pull the kind of stunts Ron Johnson does. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Friend,

**We are concerned.** Restaurants everywhere are struggling to find workers -- even getting to the point that they can't stay open due to lack of staff.

Why do you think this is happening, Friend?

We know why. **T****he Democrats want to pay people to not work. **

The Biden Administration will face greater risks than a shutdown gas pipeline and a border straining under a surge of migrants if we can't get people BACK TO WORK.

| Patriot,
Kat recently introduced the "Chinese Communist Party Politburo Accountability Act" in the House of Representatives.
More than a dozen co-sponsors have joined Kat's effort to hold the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) accountable for their systematic violations to basic human rights and freedoms. This legislation would issue sanctions against specific CCP officials who engage in disinformation and political warfare on America, steal U.S. intellectual property, or commit severe human rights abuses on the Chinese people.

name: Team Samirah
subject: ICYMI: VEA Endorses Ibraheem Samirah
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for Delegate
body:
In this election we have a chance to elect pro-education champions like Ibraheem Samirah.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29540430/286729381/-1287071472?refcode=210312_onboard&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQwYmNhZi02M2JhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5TSD87oSHvRTOutNGzjUPQSh8d8iLbuym-TVXl3YKbg=) Derek, **In case you missed it: the Virginia Education Association endorsed Delegate Ibraheem Samirah for re-election to the 86th District in the House of Delegates! ** Ibraheem earned this endorsement based on his record in the General Assembly and the VEA is confident that Delegate Samirah will continue to be a champion for our students, our schools, and our educators everywhere in his district and throughout the Commonwealth of Virginia. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29540431/286729382/-1001649105?refcode=210521_VEAPHOTO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQwYmNhZi02M2JhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5TSD87oSHvRTOutNGzjUPQSh8d8iLbuym-TVXl3YKbg=) This endorsement is personal for Ibraheem, which he made clear in his comments: “I am committed to working with the VEA in order to make sure that we have the best outcomes for our students and our educators. This means ensuring equity in the classroom, fully funding our education system from early childhood care to pre-k all the way through college, improving teacher pay and conditions, and making sure we equitably fund all of our public schools. **My mother is a teacher, and I want the best for her and all her colleagues, throughout Virginia, and I would not be where I am today without the dedication of so many teachers to ensuring I would get the best education I could have received.” ** **[This is a huge boost of momentum for our campaign as we near the finish line. Will you stand with Delegate Ibraheem Samirah and all the advocates for public education by chipping in to our campaign today? Every bit helps.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29540432/286729383/-1001649105?refcode=210521_VEA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQwYmNhZi02M2JhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5TSD87oSHvRTOutNGzjUPQSh8d8iLbuym-TVXl3YKbg=)** | | [**$15 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29540433/286729384/-1287071472?refcode=05021_vea&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQwYmNhZi02M2JhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5TSD87oSHvRTOutNGzjUPQSh8d8iLbuym-TVXl3YKbg=)

clean_body: In this election we have a chance to elect pro-education champions like Ibraheem Samirah. = Derek, In case you missed it: the Virginia Education Association endorsed Delegate Ibraheem Samirah for re-election to the 86th District in the House of Delegates! Ibraheem earned this endorsement based on his record in the General Assembly and the VEA is confident that Delegate Samirah will continue to be a champion for our students, our schools, and our educators everywhere in his district and throughout the Commonwealth of Virginia. = This endorsement is personal for Ibraheem, which he made clear in his comments: “I am committed to working with the VEA in order to make sure that we have the best outcomes for our students and our educators. This means ensuring equity in the classroom, fully funding our education system from early childhood care to pre-k all the way through college, improving teacher pay and conditions, and making sure we equitably fund all of our public schools. My mother is a teacher, and I want the best for her and all her colleagues, throughout Virginia, and I would not be where I am today without the dedication of so many teachers to ensuring I would get the best education I could have received.” = | | = | = | = | = In solidarity, Team Samirah Dr. Ibraheem Samirah is a bold, progressive who is working tirelessly to create a healthier Virginia by building quality affordable housing, an equitable healthcare system and strengthening the base of our democracy. | | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots taking Swampy scalps, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=7cb38c5bde&e=ba6e67b849)!

**Good news: We took a scalp! Never Trumper Liz Cheney was voted out of leadership this week - and is polling at 13% for re-election in Wyoming. Politically, the fat lady is singing for Liz Cheney.**

It is so crucial that we stand with the GOOD Republicans and support them! This week, Marjorie Taylor Greene came under attack from AOC, just for wanting to debate her over the Green New Deal:

_Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-N.Y.) took a swipe at Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) on Thursday, likening her to the “kinds of people that I threw out of bars” after the Georgia Republican aggressively confronted her outside the House chamber the day before._

_After Ocasio-Cortez’s departure, Greene also reportedly called the Democrat a “radical socialist” and a “chicken” who “doesn’t want to debate the Green New Deal.”

The report came after Greene challenged Ocasio-Cortez to a debate over her "Green New Deal" legislation. Not long after, Greene also went up to Ocasio-Cortez in the House chamber and posted a photo of the moment on social media. _

AOC has possibly done more damage to our country than any individual in 50 years. Yet she and the DC press corps are blaming Marjorie Taylor Greene for wanting to debate the issues.

_Debating issues. Remember when we expected politicians to do that?_

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Real quick
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends—we’ll keep this quick before the weekend begins.
[**Will you help us kick off the weekend with a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We’ll put your donation to work in our efforts to hold Arizona’s seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210521-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=655_6688874_ldAbwJ&akid=655%2E6688874%2EldAbwJ)
Just this month, the National Republican Senatorial Committee and One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC, both launched ads in Arizona attacking our campaign.
So it’s safe to say we can’t afford to get comfortable. National Republicans think they can take this seat back in 2022, and corporate special interest groups are already lining up to defeat us. It’s serious.
Mark needs our support to hold this seat so he can keep working for the people of Arizona. And the best way we can do that is by making sure we have the resources to run another strong campaign and win a full six-year term to the Senate.
**Your support will go a long way, especially this early on, so please use the link below to make a donation today:**
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/May-Goal-21**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210521-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=655_6688874_ldAbwJ&akid=655%2E6688874%2EldAbwJ)
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=655%2E6688874%2EldAbwJ).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

subject: Reminder: California Coming In Dead Last at This
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Collins for Congress | 5777 CENTURY BLVD, STE 1110-143, Los Angeles, CA 90045
body:
Vote Governor Newsom Out
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C9BsCk5JO-FSspBLLCcT1GBIcPJqosAyhtYmFKX-ODS91BVzc6_erH-BVl7KxTiTx5Ym5uVwy2S1P7lFF8QFkUlgw9yz-aCpVXbgXX90rjODhAalNjyUmPAokMomrPKrr9YUdYrN5-qno9HrSilHT0pIBZk9AeylJykWimseoFIudoFpvgcBCHtNBoQLoqJx&c=bsiV2X6FgYILTZb8XbhvRfiDJZD2H9kMh6bzsdPiSZmWMobMYxx5lw==&ch=bgYHskcxDM4hWvAs0cGg9jkIU-UEDJBsLC1XtihbDEhbzw7F13ROYg==&jrc=1)
---
| We Have a Chance, We MUST Vote Newsom Out
---
| | |
---
| Hello Peter,
---
| Governor Newsom has spent more than a year following the liberal mantra of fear and panic. He locked the whole state down, devastating small businesses and families. He has destroyed our economy, while other states, whose governors have been far less restrictive, have done just fine.
---
| | | [Click HERE to End Gavin's Reign of Fear](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C9BsCk5JO-FSspBLLCcT1GBIcPJqosAyhtYmFKX-ODS91BVzc6_erH-BVl7KxTiTx5Ym5uVwy2S1P7lFF8QFkUlgw9yz-aCpVXbgXX90rjODhAalNjyUmPAokMomrPKrr9YUdYrN5-qno9HrSilHT0pIBZk9AeylJykWimseoFIudoFpvgcBCHtNBoQLoqJx&c=bsiV2X6FgYILTZb8XbhvRfiDJZD2H9kMh6bzsdPiSZmWMobMYxx5lw==&ch=bgYHskcxDM4hWvAs0cGg9jkIU-UEDJBsLC1XtihbDEhbzw7F13ROYg==&jrc=1)
---
| This is literally the reason that Gavin Newsom will be on the ballot for a recall soon. Voters know that he has not been the leader we need, but has, instead, led us down a path of unwarranted liberal economic devastation.
---
| | | [Click HERE to Bring Change to California](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C9BsCk5JO-FSspBLLCcT1GBIcPJqosAyhtYmFKX-ODS91BVzc6_erH-BVl7KxTiTx5Ym5uVwy2S1P7lFF8QFkUlgw9yz-aCpVXbgXX90rjODhAalNjyUmPAokMomrPKrr9YUdYrN5-qno9HrSilHT0pIBZk9AeylJykWimseoFIudoFpvgcBCHtNBoQLoqJx&c=bsiV2X6FgYILTZb8XbhvRfiDJZD2H9kMh6bzsdPiSZmWMobMYxx5lw==&ch=bgYHskcxDM4hWvAs0cGg9jkIU-UEDJBsLC1XtihbDEhbzw7F13ROYg==&jrc=1)
---
| We put Newsom on the ballot for a recall but, instead of listening to his constituents, and learning something, he just proved again that he is simply incompetent to lead. The CDC just released new Covid-19 guidelines that allow for fully vaccinated people to go unmasked, both indoors and outdoors. The CDC says it is safe for fully vaccinated people to do so, but Governor Newsom, apparently, knows better (just ask him).
Gov Newsom is not going to lift the mask mandate until [June 15](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C9BsCk5JO-FSspBLLCcT1GBIcPJqosAyhtYmFKX-ODS91BVzc6_erOaApJT0r_IKq6eyW_3zZ64NsK5XTZT4zf83dx_v0aqjE6IZDSg3EMuo9xFEFjrjq0r7sRjd2WBU7KuuSozS4OhlkYqg2kjrCk8qAC4qEfCPkCH3fYTSnA2RFpFkUNm8m028Dk2fOj04g-TQ_1gdgRG0JnPZmacm7SBsF58KwrNWZDnNYEkqtaLezjBuGhOcb8OXRovqxkLB&c=bsiV2X6FgYILTZb8XbhvRfiDJZD2H9kMh6bzsdPiSZmWMobMYxx5lw==&ch=bgYHskcxDM4hWvAs0cGg9jkIU-UEDJBsLC1XtihbDEhbzw7F13ROYg==&jrc=1), making California one of the last, if not THE last, state to do so. The liberals, while spending a full year whining about how we must follow the science, ARE NOT FOLLOWING THE SCIENCE.
---
| California has become an embarrassment under Newsom. It's now time to vote him out. After we get rid of him, at the upcoming special recall election, then we need to vote the other liberal fear-mongers out of office, including Maxine Waters and Nancy Pelosi.
Please join me in fighting to bring Conservative values back, by [chipping in $20.21](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C9BsCk5JO-FSspBLLCcT1GBIcPJqosAyhtYmFKX-ODS91BVzc6_erH-BVl7KxTiTx5Ym5uVwy2S1P7lFF8QFkUlgw9yz-aCpVXbgXX90rjODhAalNjyUmPAokMomrPKrr9YUdYrN5-qno9HrSilHT0pIBZk9AeylJykWimseoFIudoFpvgcBCHtNBoQLoqJx&c=bsiV2X6FgYILTZb8XbhvRfiDJZD2H9kMh6bzsdPiSZmWMobMYxx5lw==&ch=bgYHskcxDM4hWvAs0cGg9jkIU-UEDJBsLC1XtihbDEhbzw7F13ROYg==&jrc=1) or whatever you like, Let's fire Gavin Newsom, Maxine Waters, Nancy Pelosi, and every other Democrat that is ruining this great country.
---
| | | [Click HERE to Help Us Bring Back Conservative Values](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C9BsCk5JO-FSspBLLCcT1GBIcPJqosAyhtYmFKX-ODS91BVzc6_erH-BVl7KxTiTx5Ym5uVwy2S1P7lFF8QFkUlgw9yz-aCpVXbgXX90rjODhAalNjyUmPAokMomrPKrr9YUdYrN5-qno9HrSilHT0pIBZk9AeylJykWimseoFIudoFpvgcBCHtNBoQLoqJx&c=bsiV2X6FgYILTZb8XbhvRfiDJZD2H9kMh6bzsdPiSZmWMobMYxx5lw==&ch=bgYHskcxDM4hWvAs0cGg9jkIU-UEDJBsLC1XtihbDEhbzw7F13ROYg==&jrc=1)
---
| Thank you again for your support and God bless you.
Sincerely,
Joe Collins Navy Veteran and Republican for California's 43rd Congressional District.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C9BsCk5JO-FSspBLLCcT1GBIcPJqosAyhtYmFKX-ODS91BVzc6_erNTKNhACW1SNj6JJpHAmvoylTEJVZKR4w2zK1-QYCbwc4-eh0E1w_ejeLP4kTZkixO33hMDcW-kYK9X6HXy_EiKAjqWG2msPOXfnAWk24Mr1et-9Y1YPeR0MlB6LbiTegQ==&c=bsiV2X6FgYILTZb8XbhvRfiDJZD2H9kMh6bzsdPiSZmWMobMYxx5lw==&ch=bgYHskcxDM4hWvAs0cGg9jkIU-UEDJBsLC1XtihbDEhbzw7F13ROYg==&jrc=1) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C9BsCk5JO-FSspBLLCcT1GBIcPJqosAyhtYmFKX-ODS91BVzc6_erNTKNhACW1SNTC9Xi8AZvgc6FPAj3FaVHpxy8T7sE1KME9KixkM3N1xD4rAyr4BgTCwQNcUBnH9I6uCMUcHC8GIpefvSnT7e3Ciaym83KdXU&c=bsiV2X6FgYILTZb8XbhvRfiDJZD2H9kMh6bzsdPiSZmWMobMYxx5lw==&ch=bgYHskcxDM4hWvAs0cGg9jkIU-UEDJBsLC1XtihbDEhbzw7F13ROYg==&jrc=1) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C9BsCk5JO-FSspBLLCcT1GBIcPJqosAyhtYmFKX-ODS91BVzc6_erNTKNhACW1SNj1TaONyeAoN7GB9QEmvqKFxMU-Z0oPbX2J8HSoEUrNfTy-ChRTFKLykzE36B4l9cLx6h4NsW3GTnbeVxSNLixvs0Llgw125MAj5SzhasdhurW9M45853uQ==&c=bsiV2X6FgYILTZb8XbhvRfiDJZD2H9kMh6bzsdPiSZmWMobMYxx5lw==&ch=bgYHskcxDM4hWvAs0cGg9jkIU-UEDJBsLC1XtihbDEhbzw7F13ROYg==&jrc=1)

body:

subject: May in Indiana!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
There’s no better place to be in the country than Indiana in May. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470490?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**May in Indiana!**_ There’s no better place to be in the country than Indiana in May and I'm glad this May is starting to feel normal. Normal because I’ve been getting back out of central Indiana to meet with our grassroots leaders. Normal because the roar of engines at the Indianapolis Motor Speedway is being heard. And normal because big job investments keep coming to our state. In fact, Governor Holcomb participated in two groundbreakings just this week!

Indiana is back. Our unemployment rate and workforce participation numbers are almost back to our record, pre-pandemic lows. Another sign of getting back to normal is the return of our annual spring dinner. More information on that is below. Needless to say, it will be great to get together again in the same room (not over Zoom) and celebrate our Republican victories over the last several months. I hope to see several county parties at the dinner and am looking forward to seeing everyone on June 11 in Indianapolis!

Thanks Kyle

**Photo** : _Chairman Hupfer meets with Allen County GOP Chairman Steve Shine earlier this week in Fort Wayne_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=87ca3ec74f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Continuing to Break Records**_ On Tuesday, **Governor Holcomb** joined executives from Rahal Letterman Lanigan Racing (RLL) to break ground on the company’s new state-of-the-art global headquarters in Zionsville. This $20 million investment will also create new high quality Hoosier jobs. Indiana is globally known as the Racing Capital of the World, and RLL Racing's investment continues to solidify that position.

**Governor Holcomb** also joined executives from Five Below to announce the company's plans to locate its Midwest distribution center in Indiana. The Philadelphia-based company plans to invest more than $100 million to establish distribution and e-commerce operations and create over 470 new jobs.

Under **Governor Holcomb's** leadership, Indiana has broken economic development & jobs records year after year. Thanks to the business friendly environment he has created and our pipeline of talented Hoosiers, Indiana will continue to see investment and job creation for years to come!

_**Photo:**_ _Governor Holcomb breaking ground on RLL Racing's new HQ in Zionsville_
---
|
---
| _**2021 Session: Breaking Records for Economic Development**_
**_“The sky’s really the limit for where we end up in 10 or 20 years and that’s what we’re planning for.” -Governor Holcomb._**
* Throughout the pandemic, Governor Holcomb has been focused on **_balancing lives and livelihoods._**
* Indiana remained mostly open during the pandemic and business leaders and job creators took notice.
* In 2020, during a global pandemic, **_Governor Holcomb’s administration set an all-time record for job commitments_**.
* In fact, **_Governor Holcomb has set a job commitment record every year he’s been in office._**
* One of the first bills the legislature passed and Governor Holcomb signed was to provide **_COVID liability protections_** for schools and businesses.
* Protects businesses and schools from frivolous lawsuits.

**_“Get “READI” for the future, because that’s what this is all about. It’s about talent attraction, retention, building good quality of place all over the state.” -Governor Holcomb._**

* Perhaps the **_biggest game changer_** to come from the session is the creation of the **_Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative (READI)._**
* This was part of Governor Holcomb’s agenda and he spoke about this program during his [2021 State of the State Address](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=aac5b70dc9&e=1acd9bb3d6).
* State is investing **_$500 million_** in this program.
* READI Grants are designed to support collaboration between communities across the state.
* Encourages innovative policies that will spur population growth and job creation.
* Attracts additional investment from community.
* **_READI Grants will spur investment and innovation in every region of our state and will have an impact for years to come._**

**_“READI is about harnessing that synergy whether it’s rural, urban or suburban. It’s about thinking outside of the lines—county lines, political lines—erase those and start thinking bigger.” -Governor Holcomb._**

* Governor Holcomb and Republican legislators also dedicated $60 million for **_[Hoosier Hospitality Small Business Restart](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=abf7607be9&e=1acd9bb3d6)_** grants.
* Supports Hoosier entrepreneurs and small businesses.
* Provides working capital to eligible companies by reimbursing certain expenses incurred during and related to global pandemic.
* Grant program is **_high-octane fuel_** for small businesses that will help **_accelerate their recovery and growth_**.

**_“We’re looking at billions of dollars in investment as folks look at Indiana becoming a destination to work, play, and ultimately stay.” -Governor Holcomb._**

* Indiana also **_increased_** the Venture Capital Investment tax credit cap to **_$20 million per year_**.
* Established a bonus credit for investments in minority and women-owned businesses.
* $10 million per year for manufacturing readiness grants;
* Will cement Indiana’s position as the **_#1 manufacturing state in the country_** per capita.
* **_$250 million for broadband expansion_**
* Expanding broadband connectivity remains a major priority of Governor Holcomb’s.
* Internet access is as important today as roads and telephone lines were a century ago.

**_“Hope is alive and dirt is turning.” -Governor Holcomb._**
You don’t have to take it just from me. Governor Holcomb sat down with Gerry Dick from [Inside Indiana Business](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=31a5ee0171&e=1acd9bb3d6) a few days ago to talk about invest and jobs in Indiana. You can watch the interview here:
[](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=72608e5c38&e=1acd9bb3d6)
When it comes to the race for jobs and investment in Indiana, we’re competing against ourselves at this point, but **_we can’t rest on our laurels_** or take our foot off the gas. The results of the 2021 Legislative Session will create more separation between us the 49 other states we’re competing against.

Records were made to be broken and under Governor Holcomb and Republican leaders, [you ain’t seen nothing yet!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a9e8ac3cf3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**GOP Spring Dinner is June 11!**_
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[May 21](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ad6326f15c&e=1acd9bb3d6): Hendricks County GOP Comedy Night
[June 3](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9a5cd6cc65&e=1acd9bb3d6): Kosciusko County Lincoln Day Dinner
[June 16](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7e4ce520cc&e=1acd9bb3d6): 31st Annual Henry County GOP Open
[July 17](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=94bc5a0bb5&e=1acd9bb3d6): Blackford County Lincoln Day Dinner
---
| |
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[breaks ground at RLL Racing's new HQ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8bd03f1e68&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[is pleased with restructuring of Indiana's Main Street program](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cc5ed6a8c3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell **[reminds Hoosiers to sign up for their Indiana Passport](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=410472d5de&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz **[warns of a possible scam](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0a79b3e230&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Holli Sullivan **[speaks at the Association of Indiana Counties](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=451630f5e1&e=1acd9bb3d6)
