clean_body: There’s no better place to be in the country than Indiana in May. | | | | | | | | May in Indiana! There’s no better place to be in the country than Indiana in May and I'm glad this May is starting to feel normal. Normal because I’ve been getting back out of central Indiana to meet with our grassroots leaders. Normal because the roar of engines at the Indianapolis Motor Speedway is being heard. And normal because big job investments keep coming to our state. In fact, Governor Holcomb participated in two groundbreakings just this week! Indiana is back. Our unemployment rate and workforce participation numbers are almost back to our record, pre-pandemic lows. Another sign of getting back to normal is the return of our annual spring dinner. More information on that is below. Needless to say, it will be great to get together again in the same room (not over Zoom) and celebrate our Republican victories over the last several months. I hope to see several county parties at the dinner and am looking forward to seeing everyone on June 11 in Indianapolis! Thanks Kyle Photo : Chairman Hupfer meets with Allen County GOP Chairman Steve Shine earlier this week in Fort Wayne | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Continuing to Break Records On Tuesday, Governor Holcomb joined executives from Rahal Letterman Lanigan Racing (RLL) to break ground on the company’s new state-of-the-art global headquarters in Zionsville. This $20 million investment will also create new high quality Hoosier jobs. Indiana is globally known as the Racing Capital of the World, and RLL Racing's investment continues to solidify that position. Governor Holcomb also joined executives from Five Below to announce the company's plans to locate its Midwest distribution center in Indiana. The Philadelphia-based company plans to invest more than $100 million to establish distribution and e-commerce operations and create over 470 new jobs. Under Governor Holcomb's leadership, Indiana has broken economic development & jobs records year after year. Thanks to the business friendly environment he has created and our pipeline of talented Hoosiers, Indiana will continue to see investment and job creation for years to come! Photo: Governor Holcomb breaking ground on RLL Racing's new HQ in Zionsville | | 2021 Session: Breaking Records for Economic Development “The sky’s really the limit for where we end up in 10 or 20 years and that’s what we’re planning for.” -Governor Holcomb. Throughout the pandemic, Governor Holcomb has been focused on balancing lives and livelihoods. Indiana remained mostly open during the pandemic and business leaders and job creators took notice. In 2020, during a global pandemic, Governor Holcomb’s administration set an all-time record for job commitments. In fact, Governor Holcomb has set a job commitment record every year he’s been in office. One of the first bills the legislature passed and Governor Holcomb signed was to provide COVID liability protections for schools and businesses. Protects businesses and schools from frivolous lawsuits. “Get “READI” for the future, because that’s what this is all about. It’s about talent attraction, retention, building good quality of place all over the state.” -Governor Holcomb. Perhaps the biggest game changer to come from the session is the creation of the Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative (READI). This was part of Governor Holcomb’s agenda and he spoke about this program during his . State is investing $500 million in this program. READI Grants are designed to support collaboration between communities across the state. Encourages innovative policies that will spur population growth and job creation. Attracts additional investment from community. READI Grants will spur investment and innovation in every region of our state and will have an impact for years to come. “READI is about harnessing that synergy whether it’s rural, urban or suburban. It’s about thinking outside of the lines—county lines, political lines—erase those and start thinking bigger.” -Governor Holcomb. Governor Holcomb and Republican legislators also dedicated $60 million for grants. Supports Hoosier entrepreneurs and small businesses. Provides working capital to eligible companies by reimbursing certain expenses incurred during and related to global pandemic. Grant program is high-octane fuel for small businesses that will help accelerate their recovery and growth. “We’re looking at billions of dollars in investment as folks look at Indiana becoming a destination to work, play, and ultimately stay.” -Governor Holcomb. Indiana also increased the Venture Capital Investment tax credit cap to $20 million per year. Established a bonus credit for investments in minority and women-owned businesses. $10 million per year for manufacturing readiness grants; Will cement Indiana’s position as the #1 manufacturing state in the country per capita. $250 million for broadband expansion Expanding broadband connectivity remains a major priority of Governor Holcomb’s. Internet access is as important today as roads and telephone lines were a century ago. “Hope is alive and dirt is turning.” -Governor Holcomb. You don’t have to take it just from me. Governor Holcomb sat down with Gerry Dick from a few days ago to talk about invest and jobs in Indiana. You can watch the interview here: When it comes to the race for jobs and investment in Indiana, we’re competing against ourselves at this point, but we can’t rest on our laurels or take our foot off the gas. The results of the 2021 Legislative Session will create more separation between us the 49 other states we’re competing against. Records were made to be broken and under Governor Holcomb and Republican leaders, | | GOP Spring Dinner is June 11! | | | | Upcoming Republican Events : Hendricks County GOP Comedy Night : Kosciusko County Lincoln Day Dinner : 31st Annual Henry County GOP Open : Blackford County Lincoln Day Dinner | | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Secretary of State Holli Sullivan Attorney General Todd Rokita Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Victoria Spartz Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: Senate GOP
subject: The Left hates him almost as much as they hate Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Marco Rubio is the opposite of everything the Left believes in and advertises.
|
---
| | | _**Marco Rubio is the opposite of everything the Left believes in and advertises. **_

Marco is 1 of 2 Hispanic Republicans in the U.S. Senate, and he is anti-Communist China, anti-high taxes, and pro-worker. He saw the value of hard work growing up as the son of a bartender, attended college, worked hard, and dedicated his life to public service.

_**Marco is the son of immigrants who fled Cuba, and now, he 's standing up to Communist countries and defending America from socialism. **_

This is why the Left hates him so much. Because Marco is living, breathing proof that the Democrats' socialist agenda is oppressive and does not work to lift people out of poverty.

Marco isn't the bragging type, so let us tell you what he has been working on lately...
* Standing up to "woke" corporations that cancel conservatives yet partner with Communist China
* Highlighting President Trump's success getting the vaccine developed and created -- and called out the liberal media for crediting Biden for this success
* Working to compete with and stay ahead of Communist China
* Defending Ron DeSantis' bill to make our elections more secure and make sure your vote is safe
* Fighting for veterans who honorably served our nation
* And so much more...

The Left is trying to protect their narrative that relying on the government is the only way to make it out of poverty and into the middle-class. Marco is proof that is just not true, which is why the Left is trying their best to defeat him.

Will you stand with Marco today? We need Marco in the Senate, which means we must protect and defend him from the Left's vicious attacks!

body:
The Left will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to defeat us.
| Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, It’s me: Michael Whatley. North Carolina is now GROUND ZERO for the fight to Reclaim the Senate Majority. Big things are happening in every corner of Indiana. I mean that literally - Governor Holcomb just launched the Regional Economic Acceleration and... Friend, **Big things are happening in every corner of Indiana.** I mean that literally –– Governor Holcomb just launched the Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative (READI) and the excitement is already being felt all over the state. Under this program, **half a billion dollars** is being invested in Hoosier startups, manufacturers, and airports to keep the Hoosier economy firing on all cylinders coming out of the pandemic.

**In fact,****Indiana’s unemployment is almost back to the pre-pandemic record low and even more Hoosiers are now in the workforce today than before the pandemic. ** The results speak for themselves when you see where Indiana placed in the recently-released rankings of best states to do business in. **_[Where do you think Indiana ranked, Friend? Take our quiz here to test your knowledge!](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7ef2342c82ff4677822cb38269c19710&_e=H5J1WyggQYphxMA5VHxETQiqr_ist3-_Xr00ohSLHBRyfp_jP7p5w57axZ5E8HgJzWDrwZKlcJ9waQK-aG9oAPfQIeV4WcbJ-yLR8NNwy_aGy6TURpUmok0If31E9GjOxQZirae_UVKxyMa2CYEBAV3SRXM7FE10tcq7TTVeyXyBoVg6D9-gPxNw3KSebmNIv99XdGdn4D3LB7foFMtLZSIDdNn7V_ImogZat6RMMvnjora0t1uQfYsXJ21huNm5LDd8Yw2adIQvBdUOoZ6e6s0qCqtV7_nBT98tSPOS11PEPQpo5Cl7ASgkCbuJVBrZtV3qGgJYxk47-z8zPvfg2DxAYKJ8Vh74AKcEbFq4P6kksVZ6N8cBuir6j2AmSToTVvyWwyxoTDd0R1M6nylBGIPl8fnZdcboPvlo7Eld2mXNSw66GbyQBnotUzuP3QBWV0Y8ukum7rNhGA8YZIdKU6xKNo5j6hZ1IWMBO5sIPZM%3D)_** Thanks, **_ _** Jake Oakman **_ _** \---------- Begin Forwarded Message --------- **From:** Holcomb Crew**

Friend,

Indiana is living up to its name as “a state that works” under Governor Holcomb’s leadership.

In the short time since the budget was passed, Apple, Amazon, and Toyota have joined forces to invest hundreds of millions of dollars in the Hoosier economy and committed to creating nearly 3,000 new jobs.

Since taking office in 2017, Governor Holcomb has led Indiana to four consecutive years of record job commitments and economic investment.

_Not even the pandemic was able to stop those records from being broken in 2020!_

**And we’re just getting started.**

Governor Holcomb kept his foot on the gas in this budget by investing half a billion dollars to launch the Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative (READI) which will:

* Support recovering small businesses
* Provide critical resources for Hoosier manufacturers
* Help entrepreneurs attract more startup capital

This program is transformational and will set the Hoosier economy up for years of success. With investments being made in every region of Indiana, **the sky is the limit for Hoosier workers** both today and tomorrow, no matter where they are in the state.

Throw a balanced budget, a triple-A credit rating, and low taxes on top of that, and you’ve got one of the nation’s brightest economic beacons.

**In fact, official ratings just came in for the nation’s best states to do business in.**[**Where do you think Indiana ranked?**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7ef2342c82ff4677822cb38269c19710&_e=H5J1WyggQYphxMA5VHxETQiqr_ist3-_Xr00ohSLHBRyfp_jP7p5w57axZ5E8HgJzWDrwZKlcJ9waQK-aG9oAPfQIeV4WcbJ-yLR8NNwy_aGy6TURpUmok0If31E9GjOxQZirae_UVKxyMa2CYEBAV3SRXM7FE10tcq7TTVeyXyBoVg6D9-gPxNw3KSebmNIv99XdGdn4D3LB7foFMtLZSIDdNn7V_ImogZat6RMMvnjora0t1uQfYsXJ21huNm5LDd8Yw2adIQvBdUOoZ6e6r-jd4oCY538TrnLIcuicL8_3iKY6fmjw0KVK0x6yeRt7vguyBANR6TVdtlIACrUNL57Se1jzpW4KNdYww66jXiCyj1afN7SpRE7gatc2wd7x8SViJLxEce7cT10YFX5YA-hGvkPUFYamLlkdJEdOW8FlfoYbQhgGB3EWpsLhnPbh1lHlwJRUi89jGobann8FHkp8VR21VKQIXq28ePI2vE%3D)

clean_body: Big things are happening in every corner of Indiana. I mean that literally - Governor Holcomb just launched the Regional Economic Acceleration and... Friend, Big things are happening in every corner of Indiana. I mean that literally –– Governor Holcomb just launched the Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative (READI) and the excitement is already being felt all over the state. Under this program, half a billion dollars is being invested in Hoosier startups, manufacturers, and airports to keep the Hoosier economy firing on all cylinders coming out of the pandemic. In fact,Indiana’s unemployment is almost back to the pre-pandemic record low and even more Hoosiers are now in the workforce today than before the pandemic. The results speak for themselves when you see where Indiana placed in the recently-released rankings of best states to do business in. Thanks, Jake Oakman \---------- Begin Forwarded Message --------- From: Holcomb Crew Subject: The sky's the limit for Hoosiers To: | | | Friend, Indiana is living up to its name as “a state that works” under Governor Holcomb’s leadership. In the short time since the budget was passed, Apple, Amazon, and Toyota have joined forces to invest hundreds of millions of dollars in the Hoosier economy and committed to creating nearly 3,000 new jobs. Since taking office in 2017, Governor Holcomb has led Indiana to four consecutive years of record job commitments and economic investment. Not even the pandemic was able to stop those records from being broken in 2020! And we’re just getting started. Governor Holcomb kept his foot on the gas in this budget by investing half a billion dollars to launch the Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative (READI) which will: Support recovering small businesses Provide critical resources for Hoosier manufacturers Help entrepreneurs attract more startup capital This program is transformational and will set the Hoosier economy up for years of success. With investments being made in every region of Indiana, the sky is the limit for Hoosier workers both today and tomorrow, no matter where they are in the state. Throw a balanced budget, a triple-A credit rating, and low taxes on top of that, and you’ve got one of the nation’s brightest economic beacons. In fact, official ratings just came in for the nation’s best states to do business in.** Thank you for your support, \- Holcomb Crew | | ---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2021. Peter,

Did you know that today is Armed Forces Day?

As a newly minted veteran, this is a pretty big day for Harold.

Harold’s military service, from early mornings at West Point to long nights at Ranger School, shaped him into the man, leader, and father he is today. It instilled in him a deep love for our country and the passion to protect our founding principles at all costs. It’s also what inspired him to run for Congress.

**But the Left is trying to cancel Harold because of his pride and dedication to serving our country. **

**[If that makes you angry, click here to chip in to Harold’s campaign and stick it to woke democrats who want to cancel him.>>>](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=e00bd82887c246c9aeafc94f46176e71&_e=RTpuYrZF1JQHTCeeal05pX7hxgb6hdPIPxQdaP12xCe6CrdNEW4DD9t-9xdlkvPYHZGRnSNEUpgQSG23Kcf1ws1DXDEF1HE2Bq6C9LmL08zFSpRUctmkQelNQ6NWZX-4Lz_301iPJ-GVlQqJv2J-5F4MxNhACdbPCgxaZVgnCZ7l655l_eRS44L6MqViZ6VDdiGnU8TKyzVSqNbkXd-oYsdfyOVH4VXQ4luPGsydAO_NQFPol6jnUC0VrjX0N6yRg1amfSajzJTQZeYP8UpCaPkfw-gMkdu_fCPyXdgZKsEHLks5FGRvEAxzTpMDtj7idrPvlY3ZR8-cCcwm5AOzZXb7o8Bsen0pD4yfQzeV42bhQFYijcR4lGnIxZMNuuAh53brkBG3G9Ur8-mj1lLk2_Mg7OKAZrzogQRLdv3eTZEkLUgrgooEYG3f0Qm4aaZAQVF-QM6olGVt8Vr7CSxpn9wNFOItLeANEIgdfuG-MBSpQYX62G4olSTtglxggoIP)**

Democrats like Nancy Pelosi want to cancel Harold because they are scared.

They are terrified he’ll wipe the floor with Lucy McBath, flip a critical seat in Congress, and help conservatives win back the House. They are petrified to go up against Harold on the issues because they KNOW he won’t allow them to force radical partisan policies on all of us back home.

**They’ve seen what strong conservative veterans can accomplish in Washington, and they don’t want to add another to their Republican ranks.**

One of the best ways we can honor the brave men and women in our Armed Forces is by electing another veteran to Congress to protect the freedoms they fight for every single day.

[**If you want to help make that happen, chip in today to help send Harold to Washington. >>>**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=e00bd82887c246c9aeafc94f46176e71&_e=RTpuYrZF1JQHTCeeal05pX7hxgb6hdPIPxQdaP12xCe6CrdNEW4DD9t-9xdlkvPYHZGRnSNEUpgQSG23Kcf1ws1DXDEF1HE2Bq6C9LmL08zFSpRUctmkQelNQ6NWZX-4Lz_301iPJ-GVlQqJv2J-5F4MxNhACdbPCgxaZVgnCZ7l655l_eRS44L6MqViZ6VDdiGnU8TKyzVSqNbkXd-oYsdfyOVH4VXQ4luPGsydAO_NQFPol6jnUC0VrjX0N6yRg1amfSajzJTQZeYP8UpCaPkfw-gMkdu_fCPyXdgZKsFNKUaEU5cuCNarHZ2zWtu_YqSedxiJvqkpljovn6XURf_mDu9dTiGXyNiY2hFwWVjjDcMk0eo7yCCGbpioLb9_ujBi2dAkFSH4VCQLjhYkJ91woqDM-aUjM16Y8XGOTyzLeeM5zjdUrfkh-nAluMVjaPT2Ge_Y9agNyemC4kbOynG9e0JVdmstdEr-YxeMQgioRMI7pIlR0GH51XHijJHw)

name: Patrick Leahy
subject: Make it easier to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
John Lewis was right.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) Friend, We should be making it _easier_ for all eligible Americans to cast their ballot -- not _harder_. The right -- and the freedom -- to vote is essential to our democracy. My friend and hero John Lewis called this right sacred. That's why I'm writing you today, to ask you to support the _For the People Act_ , which was passed by the House in early March, was introduced to the Senate in mid-March (I was a proud original cosponsor), and was reported to the full Senate last week. I am hopeful S.1 will be brought in front of the full Senate soon for a vote. This bill, if passed, would immediately address election security and campaign finance (to make sure elected officials are beholden to the American people and not billionaires or corporations) and expand voter registration and voting access. My dear friend John was correct: The right to vote is sacred, and we've got to protect and expand that right with all we've got. **[If you want to protect and expand the sacred right to vote, please add your name today in support of the _For the People Act_.](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/0L4gFqLy7yB_/ZjNXS29qNmpqRWdoU3F5eEczT0J5YjljdXo2K1BEaGZPdFhjSXhxbmgvczhnb0c4UHVJWFgzOWUwY0xMc29BN0haTmtoY1V6V1FHdWEyNHFVeHlVYUNPdlMxUHVvRi83SldrM29KMXFIa2M9S0/SDZjK1NPRGNkbHYwTlRiMFZXZ3B6RklZWHM5SzZaanAzUnFzT2NVdEVMSUU0cXM4Z2F2SDdES2YrTmxtWVdESW5WOW56eGkyZUg4dEFHUTBubDg5TmVFNzA5dVAvcWFOS0)** Thank you for signing on. Sincerely, Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/wm_9cV24m4cN/ZjNXS29qNmpqRWdoU3F5eEczT0J5YjljdXo2K1BEaGZPdFhjSXhxbmgvczhnb0c4UHVJWFgzOWUwY0xMc29BN0haTmtoY1V6V1FHdWEyNHFVeHlVYUNPdlMxUHVvRi83SldrM29KMXFIa2M9S0/SDZjK1NPRGNkbHYwTlRiMFZXZ3B6RklZWHM5SzZaanAzUnFzT2NVdEVMSUU0cXM4Z2F2SDdES2YrTmxtWVdESW5WOW56eGkyZUg4dEFHUTBubDg5TmVFNzA5dVAvcWFOS0)

The right -- and the freedom -- to vote is essential to our democracy. My friend and hero John Lewis called this right sacred. That's why I'm writing you today, to ask you to support the For the People Act , which was passed by the House in early March, was introduced to the Senate in mid-March (I was a proud original cosponsor), and was reported to the full Senate last week. I am hopeful S.1 will be brought in front of the full Senate soon for a vote. This bill, if passed, would immediately address election security and campaign finance (to make sure elected officials are beholden to the American people and not billionaires or corporations) and expand voter registration and voting access. My dear friend John was correct: The right to vote is sacred, and we've got to protect and expand that right with all we've got. Thank you for signing on. Sincerely, Patrick Leahy U.S. Senator |

I'm Trump-endorsed
And I'm from the North.**

**The Left is so oblivious to the Conservative movement. They always underestimate and ignore us. DON 'T GIVE THEM THE CHANCE TO SHUT US UP. Stand TODAY. Let's make some noise! **
[**I can 't do this without you, Friend. I need YOU to stand up before 9 P.M.. subject: I hate these emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:

Hi there, I hate sending emails like this. Truth be told, I’d prefer not to have to raise money for our campaign at all. The reality is that I’m one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for re-election and Republicans are already doing everything they can to flip this seat -- and the Senate majority. They’re running ads attacking me and Mitch McConnell is personally taking an interest in our race. The best way for us to hold this seat and continue fighting for issues like reproductive rights, voting rights, and combating climate change is to show our fundraising strength now. And the more money we raise from emails like this one, the fewer emails I have to send. You’re one of my most valued supporters and I could really use your help. **[Will you please donate $5 or more to protect our vulnerable Senate seat and our fragile Democratic majority? I’d like to raise $10,000 before midnight, so anything you can give helps and is appreciated.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hassan_general?refcode=e20210521_mwh&?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&&amount=5)** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your name: Team Collier
subject: climate change is no longer an issue for the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Here’s the deal, folks: This week, from the Gulf Coast to North Texas, streets are flooding, farmers and ranchers are experiencing disruption in crop productivity, and high winds are causing power outages. For decades, climate scientists have warned us about the threat of climate change — Texas is no exception. We are on the frontlines of a warming planet. We have witnessed several 100-year floods and hurricanes just in the last five years, all while continuing to endure crippling droughts in other parts of the state. **Let’s be clear: climate change is no longer an issue for the future — it is a challenge for the here and now.** In order to save our planet and our state, we need bold climate action that tackles the issue head-on and invests in the infrastructure that will save lives and livelihoods. But so far, leaders like Dan Patrick have outright denied the science of climate change. The truth is, we can implement sustainable solutions that will prepare our state for natural disasters and mitigate the effects of climate change. Mike will fight to build the Ike Dike, invest in water infrastructure, and build an energy grid for the future. But right now, state leaders like Dan Patrick care more about protecting corporate profits than the future of our great state and its people. **[Texas cannot wait for action ten or so years down the line. Sign your name if you agree that we need bold climate action solutions at the state level today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29547430/286754831/-1678218832?refcode=em210521-climate-A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTkyMjE4MS03OGJhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OCldYFTr8V9mg9f4JK-4BUzCplxMyT2RC4CA19keL8o=&emci=89922181-78ba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8a922181-78ba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7689298)** | [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29547431/286754832/-1678218832?refcode=em210521-climate-A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTkyMjE4MS03OGJhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OCldYFTr8V9mg9f4JK-4BUzCplxMyT2RC4CA19keL8o=&emci=89922181-78ba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8a922181-78ba-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7689298)

clean_body: | Here’s the deal, folks: This week, from the Gulf Coast to North Texas, streets are flooding, farmers and ranchers are experiencing disruption in crop productivity, and high winds are causing power outages. For decades, climate scientists have warned us about the threat of climate change — Texas is no exception. We are on the frontlines of a warming planet. We have witnessed several 100-year floods and hurricanes just in the last five years, all while continuing to endure crippling droughts in other parts of the state. Let’s be clear: climate change is no longer an issue for the future — it is a challenge for the here and now. In order to save our planet and our state, we need bold climate action that tackles the issue head-on and invests in the infrastructure that will save lives and livelihoods. But so far, leaders like Dan Patrick have outright denied the science of climate change. The truth is, we can implement sustainable solutions that will prepare our state for natural disasters and mitigate the effects of climate change. Mike will fight to build the Ike Dike, invest in water infrastructure, and build an energy grid for the future. But right now, state leaders like Dan Patrick care more about protecting corporate profits than the future of our great state and its people. | When we roll up our sleeves and start solving problems honestly, we can start making progress on the biggest challenges facing Texas. Thanks for being in this fight, Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: Mo Brooks
subject: Let us all rise to the occasion!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
I’m proud to announce that my good friend, Senator Rand Paul (R-KY), has endorsed my campaign for U.S. Senate! Here’s what he had to say about our race...
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rand_paul_endorsement_email&n=1)
---

| Peter -- I’m proud to announce that my good friend, Senator Rand Paul (R-KY), has endorsed my campaign for U.S. Senate! **Here’s what he had to say about our race:** _“I’m happy to endorse my friend Mo Brooks today for the U.S. Senate. Mo has proven time and time again he will stand up for liberty and do what he thinks is right. He will join me in fighting to lower spending, cut the size and power of government, curtail foreign aid, and stop our endless wars overseas. Mo will stand for the Bill of Rights and against the entrenched bipartisan power and big spenders in the Senate just as he has done in the House.”_ _**Senator Paul’s endorsement is fresh off the heels of MAJOR endorsements from President Donald Trump, the Senate Conservatives Fund, Alabama Congressman Barry Moore, and the National Association For Gun Rights!**_ [**Will you join these Conservative Champions to help us keep the momentum going by donating $500, $250, $100, $50, or whatever you can TODAY?**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm0djiEORSLg0toCapVyAFtsDxZF0mpZ5qBAvzb7cR31Dhs7HDWSJ6XmlV3TJWYv14&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rand_paul_endorsement_email&n=2 "Click here to join the fight!") [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm0djiEORSLg0toCapVyAFtsDxZF0mpZ5qBAvzb7cR31Dhs7HDWSJ6XmlV3TJWYv14&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rand_paul_endorsement_email&n=3 "Breaking: Rand Paul Endorsed Our Campaign!") Both Senator Paul and I are staunch supporters of liberty and individual responsibility, and I look forward to working alongside him in the U.S. Senate to _**STOP** _the endless wars overseas, _**BLOCK** _Biden’s attempts to undermine our Constitution, and _**LOWER** _the obscenely high federal taxes draining our working class. [_**Together, Senator Paul and I will be a force to be reckoned with in the U.S. Senate, but I need your help to ensure I get there!**_](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm0djiEORSLg0toCapVyAFtsDxZF0mpZ5qBAvzb7cR31Dhs7HDWSJ6XmlV3TJWYv14&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rand_paul_endorsement_email&n=4 "Click here to help save our country!") [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm0djiEORSLg0toCapVyAFtsDxZF0mpZ5qBAvzb7cR31OlybdhEwp1MBOX8Imu98SH27ih6XWB6ITSOVQ_3VIu9&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rand_paul_endorsement_email&n=5 "Donate $500 today >>") [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm0djiEORSLg0toCapVyAFtsDxZF0mpZ5qBAvzb7cR31PdlASrSiyaEQjOoc18JYE6x6-ZVT4ht2TyN8oO7VRiq&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rand_paul_endorsement_email&n=6 "Donate $100 today >>") [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm0djiEORSLg0toCapVyAFtsDxZF0mpZ5qBAvzb7cR31J4ZZ8C5IPNayJ53WLaXWiQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rand_paul_endorsement_email&n=7 "Donate $50 today >>") [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm0djiEORSLg0toCapVyAFtsDxZF0mpZ5qBAvzb7cR31HGC3ZKAWE3tEbkkYcTYSHc&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rand_paul_endorsement_email&n=8 "Donate $25 today >>") We need _**every**_ America First Patriot we can muster to rise to the occasion and answer the call of duty before the Socialist Democrats mangle our nation beyond repair. [**Are you in?**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm0djiEORSLg0toCapVyAFtsDxZF0mpZ5qBAvzb7cR31Dhs7HDWSJ6XmlV3TJWYv14&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rand_paul_endorsement_email&n=9 "Will you join the fight today?") For Liberty, Mo Brooks

Here are the **facts** , team: On January 6, 2021, violent insurrectionists attacked the U.S. Capitol in an attempt to overthrow the results of the presidential election after a rally with Donald Trump.

Law enforcement was outnumbered, and the attackers were able to breach the Capitol, resulting in multiple fatalities. When the dust settled, I immediately demanded a full investigation into the Capitol Police's response to the deadly, failed coup attempt. And this week, the House voted to create an independent commission to investigate the events of January 6.

But, Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell is opposing an independent investigation, lining up with Donald Trump and the rest of the right-wing circus who are allergic to accountability.

**[Republican leaders' attempt to downplay and dismiss an outright coup attempt in our nation's Capitol building is outrageous and infuriating. The American people deserve answers. If you agree, add your name now to support an independent investigation into the Capitol attack.](https://act.myngp.com/el/8_V_Kr_Nzg_lesCupPVpKknxPGZWtXLoYCRfRqofNsk=/VqX5iHpHCo5YHUspfWDamqbLBUz-da2bcox80ThLJIM=?gpsid=39_132_18988&ms=em21_210520_capbrh_adv_gq_act__KB_ettx&refcode=em21_210520_capbrh_adv_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210520_capbrh_adv_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

Congress needs to ensure justice is served to the attackers and the politicians who fueled the attack (**President Donald Trump included**). We also need to make sure a breach of the People's House can never happen again.

Yet again, Republican leadership is showing their hand -- proving outright their allegiance is to Donald Trump and not the American people. Our democracy is precious and deserves to be protected as such, which is why I'm fighting back.

**[Add your name now to join me in calling for an urgent investigation into the events leading up to and during the January 6 failed coup attempt.](https://act.myngp.com/el/8_V_Kr_Nzg_lesCupPVpKknxPGZWtXLoYCRfRqofNsk=/VqX5iHpHCo5YHUspfWDamqbLBUz-da2bcox80ThLJIM=?gpsid=39_132_18988&ms=em21_210520_capbrh_adv_gq_act__KB_ettx&refcode=em21_210520_capbrh_adv_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210520_capbrh_adv_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

-- Karen

name: For Laura
subject: Do this for Laura’s Birthday . . .
body:
When you come across someone who knows what they stand for and has the sustained passion to make a change, you know that you've met someone special.
| | | | | Patriot,

[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2H79tLmc17hH3QkIk4sysA/sJL763YL0BCoHnat763w892PChUQ) When you come across someone who knows what they stand for and has the sustained passion to make a change, **you know that you 've met someone special**.

My name is Shane Cory and I've been working with Laura for a number of years.

**Today is Laura 's 28th birthday and I wanted to take a minute to tell you a little bit about Laura and say the things she would never share about herself.**

Now, I've worked closely with a number of high-impact men and women in our movement. I was with James O'Keefe when he started Project Veritas. Long before that, I was with Judicial Watch as they boldly fought the Clinton Administration.

For 23 years, I've worked with the best and the brightest of the Conservative movement.

Before I ever got into politics, I served with amazing men in the Marine Corps . . . and I can confidently say that **Laura Loomer is one of those rare spirits that exists to fight for us**.

You may have known or heard of someone like this, someone who dedicates their life to their work.

Marine General James Mattis was an example of this. Mattis never married or had a family and every waking moment outside of church, he studied warfare with the singular goal of maintaining victory on the battlefield.

Laura is dedicated to protecting America - **but from our enemies within**.

If you ask any other 20 something if they've seen the latest hot show on Netflix or caught the gossip about some music artists, they'd babble on about it.

Laura wouldn't have a clue what you're talking about because the girl doesn't watch TV and I doubt she even has a Netflix account.

Only recently did she even bother to buy a car because she traveled so much, she didn't see the need to own one.

She lives and breathes her work - **and she does it for us**.

So on her 28th birthday, [**I ask that you help her keep going and show your appreciation for Laura 's dedication by donating $28**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2H79tLmc17hH3QkIk4sysA/sJL763YL0BCoHnat763w892PChUQ).

Almost every morning when my phone rings, I know it's Laura.

For years, she would wake me up every single morning with a daily task list that left my head spinning - and I'd plead, "Laura, I need my coffee!"

These days, she's learned to wait a bit to call but when the phone rings, my kids yell from the table as they eat breakfast, "Dad, it's Laura!"

And that last call I receive at night from a host of clients? Yep, it's Laura - with the same level of enthusiasm she started the day with.

Despite the most powerful companies, politicians and organizations in our nation doing all that they can to silencer and stop her, Laura keeps going and is unfazed.

While Laura has the drive, conviction and smarts to take on anything, [**it 's up to us to provide the fuel for her to keep going in the form of donations**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2H79tLmc17hH3QkIk4sysA/sJL763YL0BCoHnat763w892PChUQ).

She doesn't need a huge budget to make magic happen and like James O'Keefe, she started her career on credit cards to cover costs - with no expectation anyone would ever give a dime to support her.

But we help her because we love her and deeply value everything she does for us.

Help me give Laura a surprise birthday gift [**by donating $28 or more to show your appreciation and support her work**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2H79tLmc17hH3QkIk4sysA/sJL763YL0BCoHnat763w892PChUQ).

Thanks so much,

Shane Cory

---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

And the worst part... they approved $350 BILLION of YOUR taxpayer dollars to go towards a blue state bailout for Andrew Cuomo and Gavin Newsom in NY and CA. On top of that, Biden is refusing to lead at the border and take action to solve the crisis. Countless Americans' safety is on the line and the Biden Administration is turning a blind eye to our Southern border. Friend, I will proudly oppose this nonsense every step of the way. That is why I took a stand to SUE Joe Biden over his blue state bailout plan and why just the other day I signed a formal letter alongside 19 other Governors to call out Biden's FAILURE at our border. Right now, I need 200 patriots to chip in and join me in fighting back against Biden 's radical agenda. * * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. body:
This past week we’ve seen a disturbing wave anti-Israel propaganda coming from the true leaders of the Democratic Party, "The Squad." [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=21d7df72cf804261bd552c6d8de576ec&_e=kxD6Zbu2pn9r_aRXM9obCpnUDgkq5OIvDm2QeN130PHpLKdtkJqf7tUO6_kewOV1OP6dx89AK4cAtd4ParpyGoCR51b3UZ7YdlGjvkYDWlXrSvNF2PCEf-TXo0qKFEV-m4guVfCHfTZ3sH32usgXwjpF0VwOGwKLCvy8qeaauA4Ixn-jNBZkCK2lT_TDm5KtTd-NTIFUpk6QwbSRRtAjxJzfoUJ26V-L6aVN0BPr2uB6-1ZvdVKSYTOwSzo96ePjqkuIAydUrLOhzFPmzE09ISMkyfh4FhNIqpnheGoSPHHbP07HGY57Ud0uhCTq5ZLFnY1m7jcRv-zbtL_I1B6VX3USHirNGgWqVBDeTPNjg7Qjy0z-l3vY3C_ZzMt7dDx725pDe97-Zop2njpGvbDDWJnD0OylAadrL-rZzTeGp_w%3D) | |
---
Peter,
The left has a bad habit of trying to distract from their record.

**This past week we’ve seen a disturbing wave anti-Israel propaganda coming from the true leaders of the Democratic Party, AOC, Ilhan Omar, and the rest of “The Squad.”**

Their unconscionable support for Hamas terrorists has enflamed the already rising levels of anti-Semitism and fueled a wave of anti-Semitic violence across America.

Yet the same party that portrays Hamas terrorists as victims, is coming after me, calling me “Hate Crime Hawley.”

**The nickname would be offensive if it wasn’t so laughably absurd.**
[_**FIGHT DEMOCRAT HYPOCRISY >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=21d7df72cf804261bd552c6d8de576ec&_e=kxD6Zbu2pn9r_aRXM9obCpnUDgkq5OIvDm2QeN130PHpLKdtkJqf7tUO6_kewOV1OP6dx89AK4cAtd4ParpyGoCR51b3UZ7YdlGjvkYDWlXrSvNF2PCEf-TXo0qKFEV-m4guVfCHfTZ3sH32usgXwjpF0VwOGwKLCvy8qeaauA4Ixn-jNBZkCK2lT_TDm5Kt2t9zwh7nWknDnyfxSFbDzUnmrYGgsKj-eh5Q74w1BKXjCMpXAT2rTAZa7sF9wWE_cslBQBHqmVOxiu-sTPkyvEEe8lKov5atWErqrtebupIDV256j-dwTRDBHiGmgguQZmIqaj0YQo2YREj1o4W_WG37-aVNVosKj16P7K1hS1UhGJOuvSt7cotwPj2uCdOGFWwq69vGG-incudRtxTzCQndQHLP8Lh3iVpl1Bu64ME%3D)
Liberals are still furious that I chose to side with free speech at the expense of offending Communist China.

I still believe that the federal government should not be in the business of policing free speech; deciding what speech is offensive, then monitoring it.

**Democrats should address the anti-Semitism in their own leadership ranks!!**** **

Don’t fall for the **DEMOCRAT DISTRACTIONS**!
[_**DONATE**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=21d7df72cf804261bd552c6d8de576ec&_e=kxD6Zbu2pn9r_aRXM9obCpnUDgkq5OIvDm2QeN130PHpLKdtkJqf7tUO6_kewOV1OP6dx89AK4cAtd4ParpyGoCR51b3UZ7YdlGjvkYDWlXrSvNF2PCEf-TXo0qKFEV-m4guVfCHfTZ3sH32usgXwjpF0VwOGwKLCvy8qeaauA4Ixn-jNBZkCK2lT_TDm5Ktpfvg4QCdZ8b1cCrp0gC-OWivV9LA_NZPJvyudcfnj7W94RZ0gG0OKzgZhvC4C85AbwMcUfsODFspPMyWE8NUWGVtBzJvJW42lNeNJIWvRrf1LZSc7NMhSy4SzEiEh7D4-36Pjcz6pJFoFRPC2MGh3Oo7OelHsrTbKD-uKLKeP1IrkgiTHG2nDLaTGJNNUt6FCnLFfC6tqg6YPf0iC9xGoEw75zdqggQEjkrxagIGDE8%3D)
We're in this together,
Josh Hawley

P.S. If you want to join our team and be part of this movement, sign-up and donate to our campaign. Every dollar helps us fight the big tech, big-corporation, elitist establishment who are hell-bent on keeping the status quo.

name: Erica Smith
subject: My very personal experience with abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I have a lot to say.
#
This email is a long one, but I have a lot to say.
As I’m sure you’ve heard by now, the Supreme Court will soon take up a case that it can use to overturn Roe v. Wade.
**So today I wanted to share my very personal experience with abortion.**
I had my youngest son, Elias, at 22 weeks. He was very premature as a result of preeclampsia and pregnancy-induced hypertension. It was a really scary situation.
At 16 weeks, my doctors told me that if I continued my pregnancy I would be risking my own death.
This meant I faced an incredibly difficult decision. Before Elias’ delivery, I had to decide on priority of life. **“If it comes down to it,” my care team asked, “Do you want us to save you or your unborn child?"**
Only I could make that decision. Despite my infinite love for my children and family, I made the decision for doctors to save my baby if they could not save us both.
This experience has shaped my views and policy positions on abortion rights. Nothing should stand in the way of a person’s right to abortion.
With the rise of back-door attempts at overturning abortion rights across several states, including here in North Carolina, it has never been more imperative for Congress to codify Roe v. Wade as soon as possible.
**And we’ll have a fighting chance at that by electing Democratic senators who will fight from the bottom of their hearts for the right to a safe, legal abortion.**
[**_North Carolina women deserve a champion for their health care rights in the U.S. Senate. Will you please consider making a donation to our campaign today? If you send me to Washington, I’ll do everything I can do codify Roe v. Wade and abortion rights._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1375?refcode=em20210521-107&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=107%2E3698%2EXtffz4)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1375?refcode=em20210521-107&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=107%2E3698%2EXtffz4)**
Thank you for reading,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210521-107-footer&t=21&refcode2=107_3698_Xtffz4&akid=107%2E3698%2EXtffz4)**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: No January 6 commission?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
I’m deeply concerned about what I read last night in _Politico_ :
_“Mitch McConnell’s opposition to a bipartisan proposal to independently investigate the Capitol insurrection is turning GOP senators against the bill, potentially dooming its prospects in the Senate.”_
Mitch McConnell wants to stop a full investigation of what happened on January 6 to protect Republican politicians like Josh Hawley and Ted Cruz. And most of all, he wants to protect Donald Trump.
But we can’t just move on from the deadly and destructive attack on the Capitol. **Our democracy is at stake, and I will continue fighting for full accountability for all those responsible for this attack.**
**[Chip in $3 or more today to fuel my work for justice and to expose GOP complicity with the attack on the Capitol. We MUST investigate, uncover, and document everything that happened, and hold people like Trump fully accountable.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2626?refcode=em20210521-309&t=19&akid=309%2E420207%2Eb6B1Gz)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2626?refcode=em20210521-309&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=309%2E420207%2Eb6B1Gz)**
During the insurrection, I remember hunkering down in a room of the Capitol with some of the very GOP members who helped fuel the attack — and who still push the Big Lie today. They continue Trump’s lies about the election results and threaten our democracy. Of course, this was after Trump, Hawley, Cruz, and other Republican lawmakers used their large platforms to incite people with falsehoods and propaganda. It’s clear to me that disinformation has become one of the hallmarks of the Republican Party.
We know that Mitch McConnell is an obstacle to any policies that will secure economic, social, racial, or environmental justice. Now, he’s an obstacle to a bipartisan investigation that will help our democracy survive. **We can’t let McConnell continue to stop a full and complete investigation.**
**[Join me in speaking out about the need to expose the truth about January 6 and hold the GOP fully accountable. Donate today to help me keep up this fight and preserve our democracy.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2626?refcode=em20210521-309&t=21&akid=309%2E420207%2Eb6B1Gz)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210521-309-footer&t=22&refcode2=309_420207_b6B1Gz&akid=309%2E420207%2Eb6B1Gz)**

---
**Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Candidate Chris Lins - Bow/Dunbarton Special Election _****_NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans **
---
|
---
| **Dear ****Derek,**

**This week Republican leaders took a successful step in protecting New Hampshire residents against the horrendous H.R1 legislation via amendment to SB89. This amendment will nullify H.R.1 in the chance that D.C Democrats push it into law. By including this amendment, Granite Staters will not need to fear a federal overhaul of our elections, maintaining public trust in the system we’ve built over generations. ****

Even with this amendment, it is important that we continue to educate and share the reasoning as to why H.R.1 is so detrimental for Granite Staters, as well as every other state in the nation. We cannot let up against this blatant attack on state leadership, and must see to it that our federal delegation knows how opposed N.H residents are to this bill. Whether you’re willing to write a letter to the editor, reach out to our representatives, or share information on social media - every bit helps.

We just saw Governor Chris Sununu go on his #Super603Day - if you missed his posts on Facebook and Twitter, I implore you to check them out! He had a great time exploring what’s possible in a typical New Hampshire day - as we enter the summer, and with our unemployment rate the lowest in the nation at 2.8%, I expect we’ll all have a SUPER 603 Summer ahead of us all!

****Finally I would like to direct everyone to Chris Lins, a candidate in the upcoming Bow/Dunbarton election. Chris Lins is running against a left-wing Democrat in a district that already hosts two liberal representatives. If you have any time to volunteer, or financial means to contribute, I urge you to help Chris in his efforts. Our success in the previous special election with Bill Boyd was due to the group efforts of republicans across the state - let’s make it happen again! **

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

| **_New Hampshire Republicans Protect Granite Staters from D.C Overhaul _**

**This week Election Law heard and passed amendment #2021-1445h. This amendment means that if the Democrat power-grab HR1 Passes, then NH State laws remain in effect in our elections, making sure that New Hampshire has power to control it's own elections.Statement from Representative Barbara Griffin (R) – Goffstown on the amendment for SB 89:
“The amendment to SB 89 will prevent federal overreach, uphold the integrity of our election process and ensure that NH remains in charge of its elections, not the Federal government. Republicans will make sure to let Washington, D.C. know that H.R.1/S.1 does not uphold the values of the American people, rather, it’s another attempt at total control.”****

| **Republican Spotlight : Chris Lins **

| |
---
| | **This weeks republican spotlight is Chris Lins, a candidate running in the Bow/Dunbarton special election for state representative. **

**Chris moved to New Hampshire during his elementary years, living in Nashua before settling down in Bow. After graduating from Concord High School in 1984, Chris went on to study engineering at Northeastern University, graduating cum laude in 1989. **

**Chris is running for State Representative because he is confident he can make positive difference for his community. He is a two-time colorectal cancer survivor, understanding the importance of time and looking to the future despite adversity. **

** Currently this area already hosts two liberal Democrat candidates, and candidate Chris Lins would provide a much needed balance to policy discussion, as well as a voice to conservative community members. **

**If you can donate any of your time or financial support to Chris Lin's campaign please take the time to do so!**

**_It is of the utmost importance that we support Republican candidates across the Granite State to ensure success for conservative values across New Hampshire!_**

clean_body: Check out what happened this past week! | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | Weekly Newsletter ** Note from Chairman Stepanek Weekly Governor's Glance **Upcoming Events House Republican Update Senate Republican Update Republican Spotlight Candidate Chris Lins - Bow/Dunbarton Special Election NHGOP Tweets NH Federation of Republican WomenNH Young Republicans | | Dear Derek, This week Republican leaders took a successful step in protecting New Hampshire residents against the horrendous H.R1 legislation via amendment to SB89. This amendment will nullify H.R.1 in the chance that D.C Democrats push it into law. By including this amendment, Granite Staters will not need to fear a federal overhaul of our elections, maintaining public trust in the system we’ve built over generations. Even with this amendment, it is important that we continue to educate and share the reasoning as to why H.R.1 is so detrimental for Granite Staters, as well as every other state in the nation. We cannot let up against this blatant attack on state leadership, and must see to it that our federal delegation knows how opposed N.H residents are to this bill. Whether you’re willing to write a letter to the editor, reach out to our representatives, or share information on social media - every bit helps. We just saw Governor Chris Sununu go on his #Super603Day - if you missed his posts on Facebook and Twitter, I implore you to check them out! He had a great time exploring what’s possible in a typical New Hampshire day - as we enter the summer, and with our unemployment rate the lowest in the nation at 2.8%, I expect we’ll all have a SUPER 603 Summer ahead of us all! Finally I would like to direct everyone to Chris Lins, a candidate in the upcoming Bow/Dunbarton election. Chris Lins is running against a left-wing Democrat in a district that already hosts two liberal representatives. If you have any time to volunteer, or financial means to contribute, I urge you to help Chris in his efforts. Our success in the previous special election with Bill Boyd was due to the group efforts of republicans across the state - let’s make it happen again! | Stephan Stepanek NHGOP Chairman | | | | Weekly Governor's Glance | | | Did you catch the Governor's adventure through the Granite State during #Super603Day? | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "Follow Governor Chris Sununu on Twitter!" | | Upcoming Events | | | May 29th Sullivan County GOP Memorial Weekend BBQ June 3rd HCRC Lincoln Day Dinner (Feat. This amendment means that if the Democrat power-grab HR1 Passes, then NH State laws remain in effect in our elections, making sure that New Hampshire has power to control it's own elections.Statement from Representative Barbara Griffin (R) – Goffstown on the amendment for SB 89: “The amendment to SB 89 will prevent federal overreach, uphold the integrity of our election process and ensure that NH remains in charge of its elections, not the Federal government. Republicans will make sure to let Washington, D.C. know that H.R.1/S.1 does not uphold the values of the American people, rather, it’s another attempt at total control.” | To view the entire House Calendar for the week, click the link below! | | "Calender Link" | | | Republican Spotlight : Chris Lins | | | | This weeks republican spotlight is Chris Lins, a candidate running in the Bow/Dunbarton special election for state representative. Chris moved to New Hampshire during his elementary years, living in Nashua before settling down in Bow. After graduating from Concord High School in 1984, Chris went on to study engineering at Northeastern University, graduating cum laude in 1989. Chris is running for State Representative because he is confident he can make positive difference for his community. He is a two-time colorectal cancer survivor, understanding the importance of time and looking to the future despite adversity. Currently this area already hosts two liberal Democrat candidates, and candidate Chris Lins would provide a much needed balance to policy discussion, as well as a voice to conservative community members. name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, We saw another exciting week on the campaign trail for Jane as we held our first Day of Action, Jane got national media attention for speaking to the issues voters care about, and Jane continued to be well-received as she travels this great state. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Jane on Fox News** On Wednesday, Jane joined Fox News’ Special Report to talk about her efforts to combat Critical Race Theory in Ohio. The campaign recently launched a statewide listening tour to talk with concerned parents about education curriculums and the radical Critical Race Theory ideology that is increasingly infiltrating schools across Ohio. [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c74b2cddfdbd4fd98a315451619bddce&_e=2VTsO6stJdkjhynH_Ekn-vPzxICyialoiBlJT7JOgqRRYJ0RXcskAFP4s_BubJ2hi5x8CJQvSQPppV4XNIuuss_BV7HcEUBuezYodeun4dNXfec-XX0vQ2PnEsGwKsuVF64o1TP5gZTJdQLMlD-0YA3M9Qw8-n3tCfytW5Iq9hiurgIQn8_OCieFCkMvevzQpVWzUPyr62zbK3_v8rAentrqgCToC3uYK558wX3KGX27wciGrsrOthTfNoAok5atT_L6t1W8B6eiRPlCeiIQNPjve3Jzr6T8tlXzh5grZMo%3D)
**From the Trail**
Saturday was our very first Day of Action across Ohio. Volunteers across the state hit the pavement in support of Jane’s America First campaign for U.S. Senate.

We were thrilled with the turnout for our first big day of door knocking nearly a year before the primary, but the response we receive at the door is even more thrilling! Voters are responding to Jane’s campaign as we continue to build momentum.
Jane’s Statewide Listening Tour continued on Wednesday in Beavercreek. As Jane travels the state, education and Critical Race Theory are the issues we’re hearing most from moms and dads as they are increasingly alarmed by what’s happening in their kids’ schools.
Earlier today, Jane joined the Lake County Republican Party at their monthly luncheon. Jane always loves seeing old friends and making new ones as she speaks about her agenda for the U.S. Senate.
**Latest Endorsements**
The statewide network of support for Jane continued to grow this week! They know what I know, which is Jane’s trusted leadership as Ohio Republican Party Chairman is exactly what we need in the U.S. Senate, but don’t take my word for it.

“Northwest Ohio needs a Senator that understands its diverse economy and people and advocates for our interests in Washington. That person is Jane Timken. I have had the pleasure of getting to know Jane over the past 4 years and I trust her to put the best interest of her constituents and country first in every situation.” – Christina Muryn, Mayor of Findlay

Full List of This Week’s Endorsements

Christina Muryn, Mayo of Findlay
Chris Wallace, Madison County Commissioner
Alan Harold, Stark County Auditor
Alex Zumbar, Stark County Treasurer
Matt Nolan, Warren County Auditor
**Joe Biden is Weakness Personified**
Rather than focusing on soaring inflation, a raging border crisis, conflict in the Middle East, high unemployment, skyrocketing gas prices, and a labor shortage, Joe Biden is coming to town to tout the trillions of your taxpayer dollars he is wasting and push a plan to spend even more!

Biden is projecting weakness and the world is taking notice and acting accordingly, which is exactly what Jane wrote about this week in her [Letter to the Editor](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c74b2cddfdbd4fd98a315451619bddce&_e=2VTsO6stJdkjhynH_Ekn-p7PbsLBDBDSoDPlxyy80TRQR8GCwyFzsxBeZRaAA7RdczRed2CZJ704Itc9g3B4nCyW45qWEj4kPyVTcF_q4YCZCuA_h_tQerzsWPeqdTQggE9OwFFDD7Oz33sS9vXJFtShmLgPqBc528u-xKfF4fghVRUjkA4hXYTKQcfkbcbz7pQh19EZLQFY5krEICT9xP4x0DjdgCB1Ji1WNWIvJEPpep-Zz53g_uOnU_O0ZXJ6xZlmUo9W5CobFRglr2UKMcvmOjyCjsTI8GBvzt6mTMaQ_op_IQJDZXsVxJmSshX1Pylu5J-xj2P588gHXxQo8uIlj42wXoRHhe0a5W0nMePjWLDQS3hGFzMVdjcnURwMxAf2DLlhehwqDYeyfRk7vQ%3D%3D) for Cleveland.com.

**“Former President Donald Trump projected strength on the world stage. America and our allies were better for it. President Joe Biden is projecting weakness. Our enemies are gleefully capitalizing on it.**
**Hamas is [firing hundreds of rockets](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c74b2cddfdbd4fd98a315451619bddce&_e=2VTsO6stJdkjhynH_Ekn-obhoVudcOxHiIIGKiieW_6C8xhvdT6exH6hcNl8xX-AZB-o9w-xZCiR3WUtIZyesv_SLu0vcYOYF4ZAANpUofL-_AEw1uJBrJ33z6B32GRm_bt9ap7PYhBmvEstFeiG2RtodhvFtABRe_PXq0PVPPhG9okTqEi-SQ__CIh2BrIn6lnT75fCMIONsNY7eIElnCwRPlhFtvSuOobIunQK2wa5nNw-VN9opVJgoJaeAaguEMisee75sKZJ36UjCqBFoLUsi9AJ6D1cizhLcQUzWwFrvywY-W6pysN3SiaFiwtMvt6TvtyUgsWOxRIyXfJTNqrTGhpjggCStWCKd8NvuJkG63PCIYxQVfsv1dCKSDp2) seeking to decimate Israel. Under Biden, Trump’s “[dawn of peace](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c74b2cddfdbd4fd98a315451619bddce&_e=2VTsO6stJdkjhynH_Ekn-pBF8SKYpYF6s8ZTpNlLJL63GQRS132PpSkfPBMgRylcL7IMPNqK_4X5lk6-HgNlxAhJZSiQqT0FZJ89F7FmnEVHZDQGrzcT-_yKCbN2GKuvSr-gOf9i7sZzMWKpVbFBOOXocinN-PBYC8ZLDn--4LDx_AVhUtfQX1YsxACylI-5czV9KocOe-B126m-Zi9LrQEY-_xJesB3OLGFHkAvhrfa16sALMB72ixSO_AgEEi-sG5ypPerz1KQ1n9WR28XZWtF92J7Lg8eSSMoHL4lXQcGHr-dsiORA-Rl_9QxKBqo8n8zgvr2mD_YshmZ66sFBz0o96XntYtOoM0AeHD2sAk%3D)” in the Middle East is now the dusk of war.**

**An emboldened Iran is [moving toward nuclear capabilities](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c74b2cddfdbd4fd98a315451619bddce&_e=2VTsO6stJdkjhynH_Ekn-obhoVudcOxHiIIGKiieW_6C8xhvdT6exH6hcNl8xX-A-mRm8HyDQF_7kI_A4-d-FwZa7Z8d2ZlhHCqVxMcbXe9IRSee7_i9nYM2cBMre9-KZOjkA_WmMPGR5ivPIiX54unAGDMxdStksNBUQWFGRB_3wtLeiLyzcs49OTDIjZfeS7vet5XOsls4frEj_CSCr_QbWtCjLXEOK4JxS35mtEh1vyzKRnxF-na3pOxKEhzQRyhmuHA536Bio_2Ap3ntQrqT54tmq6SP3oaIK7-jANj-YI1GHWjIju22ySkngivaaUbUskUQtTfHX4LWVz8RD78CwQ9BIW8KepKa88NnvwNNHc_Xw7KuAwA0svleYXEy). Trump sanctioned Iran, Biden [is negotiating](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c74b2cddfdbd4fd98a315451619bddce&_e=2VTsO6stJdkjhynH_Ekn-guWwM0jrHmNTxVGTIw2UQi8Xr9P8wauMiQFaNAIDbfDGxPWVOR3CWz3Cm4D8lc9iTGOWT6t6Xv23buOd-8Oj7zurHpNksoyAE4_oXkhluTsZPi16yYccOlIzGTzGAVNIcEvloZ37SdZNdsrjn-sRttmSGoZ026k1UdSdyjKQv1x_q3gyk2TViZxhAs8c00GWfOOKhmOK_xhGlYcsV6NGDO_DwH1Dr40w9iiIIGKjRvmZzlOGJfoPyLRDbJaWUZnYUXTmk_oeTygpDHrcXZQZQL6Ku18RH4YDW52M-stl81b6t-NLnNgK3pNFTEXIq7MYksbou5JhOas79aexMS5khuKe88Ij-Uh5TMTGfhULMxz8SW3ZBTsAcH_mld--BkWKA%3D%3D) with them.**

**Russian hackers attacked a pipeline that [carried 45% ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c74b2cddfdbd4fd98a315451619bddce&_e=2VTsO6stJdkjhynH_Ekn-g4HGDUyPJL1elxF1tMMrI8DYuHiP6AMKeEhGdLIGYf-ZBPfpe3QEGszfo4TV9mIpRx2ZOQdx-rDa_td9-8lIRrGNaXoa3VzVdYk-s51wTC9PhG1JhfrPfi0sajzSN7RSqaXQ1Kg7ICRbamDXb1a4dZH99rgpdjNsC2UKzaIiqAGwBTIE6u1XmCFBTV_Odv6fgtaXPhF584KhAj9Y1Vl0Gg7YUYjZVg-yiWikllcsvEDqw80RqJKQmLrwcKbV73RG5p47FjIdBgXKksS2H_GAVi4WCZriAh9U3yi2bPy5Q-KeE3txFb2ak0uteWg7J5S4A%3D%3D)of the East Coast’s fuel, creating massive gas shortages. Trump advanced American energy, Biden is [killing it](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c74b2cddfdbd4fd98a315451619bddce&_e=2VTsO6stJdkjhynH_Ekn-nuqv1n_LjdcbROAv9lTE6mSSaoRTvybYlql0zcaQWa2BtSwvkxd823EkfQC6cHNyCxM1GRmU1MFKOf7i6XeXOLH_eZCUYDLaTiLVo2_PIA5Lc2rnBlZD2sg5klFtl3_H08U1aBRBx_p98C6ui-RbKD0WRZm2xtmlDJCJTGLpBYhHLwL1XzYrVodtI7QZq1axpLoM1_C45Ngnl9700196yHSGB5MlJQ6pPFaoMwlByFeSjcH7HNVEW0EZMtgUjhFM4NocQ9YwW4c1g_dx9jOwrnZ2yKrjCqDpYlMn4mTBEBNCzcLFgLS54rrsDqxDn_2gw%3D%3D).**

**China is [threatening Taiwan](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c74b2cddfdbd4fd98a315451619bddce&_e=2VTsO6stJdkjhynH_Ekn-k8BXIip3-BTFz97VWz984GdcWQusjGsmJrFikUDQWKuNZIFIG0ng5zBK1V1FXqDFaTUzca4gQ4RTZyELNw59wkH7LcN4HB35R-9p2WE-HiRMhG794oAy1Kru1zbbGfiyzkcRFWag0j3DBc33TdNS8n7ZO8rtnrjI4h1vxvC_rbd5DL40A1b6izbzcooVjsNI-nOGDvYpTex6hUNCScwkWCCgoaxmUGJdhJe1HeYqSoalXl4z6wItE0oWkoqMAl-BneLU6CFo8H6Cs8VaJdxJnaREOrHT_4MwZl_F0ponNuuGBkvJt_jzmsQ3ESwIjSnULZb9RrDItg-UiDzvQZDVErwwSTHLTIpK0Sb_N9pRZ7fr7JoRDZxfer_k-3CR9gSfG7_UG5BUn78LAtPi0VMqyM%3D) and has increased U.S. propaganda efforts [by 500%](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c74b2cddfdbd4fd98a315451619bddce&_e=2VTsO6stJdkjhynH_Ekn-k8BXIip3-BTFz97VWz984GdcWQusjGsmJrFikUDQWKuNZIFIG0ng5zBK1V1FXqDFaTUzca4gQ4RTZyELNw59wkH7LcN4HB35R-9p2WE-HiRMhG794oAy1Kru1zbbGfiyzkcRFWag0j3DBc33TdNS8n7ZO8rtnrjI4h1vxvC_rbdGlA43zbJlHL1GIpmouq_dmx91G-XEM16Et2z07nK_Ri0YQX06zGY8w71eBvrGzJDsURf8_oB9uPwYj6-oIB9Za9y3h_BppkXQaA0cyh-qe7froxvB9anmv41Xu_xjInMmI-JqbOs0n9mwlNMeVK3GCwHNBRdHBiWfqBufLIsd7d_YxQk_Z2OTsP1AjFCRX2oenGdm33DB3WYet3x54_SZqDOaz-brmF-HKRjcZv8tDI%3D). Trump stood up to China, Biden dismissed its Uighur genocide as “[a dfferent norm](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c74b2cddfdbd4fd98a315451619bddce&_e=2VTsO6stJdkjhynH_Ekn-gPO0D6L7pIIgEvKQPs_uRsSMEZwiwmgSk9I3AK09Uy-QSZKsecGh030wa90dKlnVbz_MN_gANQXg9XADkQL4z9s3YigL71qvoW4By-gNYd-0YUsnltbS79y_bop0norJ7F1KY_gyQfmn2nDcvQPpqX7Ic131vgrBIjjwsilg__BvdB2MH7eG8IbKBLpV3RImghuvdtb-MSH_urUDu759MEWRXx81tOAptotsoAYYNBOQnE5cKn5LcxJ7fUFjPUGvcRBGXqJGcXLXa9-6op_J3TnmFLWpSSg6phqdBbqvgwSJe6EVETMI91tHsCNY7hbnpIppKgil4mElepYfJE-l50%3D).”**

**Our immigration crisis is the worst it’s been [in decades](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c74b2cddfdbd4fd98a315451619bddce&_e=2VTsO6stJdkjhynH_Ekn-vYJi5bgFHs4juukKN45_jtGw_PyBHwO6GilF4hwUNOr9ua7xmdSBuPt8ADUejtWwpgsUEhXEWkzUnVCeg06ai1pyjuCqmzm2s2hU2WUy5yGjFILMtaNkUQWY1wG9Q8MuEm55qptO_zGCNCMD4gD6601a_bRd_mr8TClFzS6xm8F_4JDrvivGGncygkwI2NqhGWJLG3uKrdj2FoO3Wj0PQMc-LgHwcE7buXr1dQrAG_7zOxY6bBFACsG5OrMS791YQrEDdIQGzzjrhtmA8E_SKCOtMUIxl5f7r2xxyym-8v4KvjBWXbnt1mstsxvaZG9Ai2i-qqEq5R6IGmgpF6cajvwZ2Ha6bLOS8RD6toTB3cDvAbvDWi9EicFm4kteW9vByXniihmQDB21dVD6ifiJlg%3D). Trump built a wall at our Southern border, Biden [promised amnesty](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c74b2cddfdbd4fd98a315451619bddce&_e=2VTsO6stJdkjhynH_Ekn-itaIhH074Ohf1JCvzXa_6ZlTjJd8ILOsvfJ0izQf-hlzYe1ruXLyTWYqq47-zoYMQLC9VMj5B5dnxuEMKVlJdpM1B07IqYocGVN4irsjnnUbmE-R7EBkIOEF4c1-HIu_iFEYgmNa2BR-xsEFsxyiPQhOHStf9OI9ZiLqKCnZAyPf7Rx44RpPX5x4qxBVpSEhhJEK5Y_hzAnZKK2Lx4iVKYY-FMZMLPj2AFPgCuk6myhIaZRgqMgfAB0hWk6kV7IJgp05FiAAAwVKs54faGuJdobYjHsNOSC9AX4-Mmvv_EdNkq5gK5CwnyaSTa0QgE3W0Bibl66ImcGcnrQUSxNDlc-5LD870Tug1M-g6B49N2g).**

**Biden is weakness personified. His determination to do everything the exact opposite of Trump has created disastrous ramifications around the world. We must return to strong America First policies that protect America and our allies.”**

Just like we need strong leadership in the White House, we need strong leadership for Ohioans in the U.S. Senate. Jane is proving that she is the best candidate and the campaign will continue to show that week in and week out.
As always, if you or anyone you know wants to get involved with Jane’s campaign, visit our website at [www.janetimkenforohio.com](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=c74b2cddfdbd4fd98a315451619bddce&_e=sYXMfo4DT2tMm7ba_dNp8igMF3sP1O5E0QNvwXwjkZaJfu3KbFtFfwiWZriBmaboV0N5hSYE5O7FVMJl3zMUJTF9ixDkbLBuKoYmZ04axkpDJ5PS6TGQIa1F_JHItpTsRHBdbe386dPTzLE4-AtTyt1xmumj78CiRKqIcUvrptYNVx8rGRAGfqYfU77xm0DxIZjKvRlBDOF9geqW1cv8vaoZmRW6mvXPJ42k8Ul0TDt4iSM3bUrOZg3oZD5qy7oHpPkoUbJutqKPcTUrkSwaGA%3D%3D) and sign up to join the team today!

Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio

The campaign recently launched a statewide listening tour to talk with concerned parents about education curriculums and the radical Critical Race Theory ideology that is increasingly infiltrating schools across Ohio. From the Trail Saturday was our very first Day of Action across Ohio. Volunteers across the state hit the pavement in support of Jane’s America First campaign for U.S. Senate. We were thrilled with the turnout for our first big day of door knocking nearly a year before the primary, but the response we receive at the door is even more thrilling! Voters are responding to Jane’s campaign as we continue to build momentum. Jane’s Statewide Listening Tour continued on Wednesday in Beavercreek. As Jane travels the state, education and Critical Race Theory are the issues we’re hearing most from moms and dads as they are increasingly alarmed by what’s happening in their kids’ schools. Earlier today, Jane joined the Lake County Republican Party at their monthly luncheon. Jane always loves seeing old friends and making new ones as she speaks about her agenda for the U.S. Senate. Latest Endorsements The statewide network of support for Jane continued to grow this week! They know what I know, which is Jane’s trusted leadership as Ohio Republican Party Chairman is exactly what we need in the U.S. Senate, but don’t take my word for it. “Northwest Ohio needs a Senator that understands its diverse economy and people and advocates for our interests in Washington. That person is Jane Timken. I have had the pleasure of getting to know Jane over the past 4 years and I trust her to put the best interest of her constituents and country first in every situation.” – Christina Muryn, Mayor of Findlay Full List of This Week’s Endorsements Christina Muryn, Mayo of Findlay Chris Wallace, Madison County Commissioner Alan Harold, Stark County Auditor Alex Zumbar, Stark County Treasurer Matt Nolan, Warren County Auditor Joe Biden is Weakness Personified Rather than focusing on soaring inflation, a raging border crisis, conflict in the Middle East, high unemployment, skyrocketing gas prices, and a labor shortage, Joe Biden is coming to town to tout the trillions of your taxpayer dollars he is wasting and push a plan to spend even more! Biden is projecting weakness and the world is taking notice and acting accordingly, which is exactly what Jane wrote about this week in her for Cleveland.com. “Former President Donald Trump projected strength on the world stage. America and our allies were better for it. President Joe Biden is projecting weakness. Our enemies are gleefully capitalizing on it. Hamas is seeking to decimate Israel. Under Biden, Trump’s “” in the Middle East is now the dusk of war. An emboldened Iran is . Trump sanctioned Iran, Biden with them. Russian hackers attacked a pipeline that the East Coast’s fuel, creating massive gas shortages. Trump advanced American energy, Biden is . China is and has increased U.S. propaganda efforts . Trump stood up to China, Biden dismissed its Uighur genocide as “.” Our immigration crisis is the worst it’s been . Trump built a wall at our Southern border, Biden . Biden is weakness personified. His determination to do everything the exact opposite of Trump has created disastrous ramifications around the world. We must return to strong America First policies that protect America and our allies.” Just like we need strong leadership in the White House, we need strong leadership for Ohioans in the U.S. Senate. Jane is proving that she is the best candidate and the campaign will continue to show that week in and week out. As always, if you or anyone you know wants to get involved with Jane’s campaign, visit our website at and sign up to join the team today! Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | ---|---

clean_body: The crazy thing here is Click here to opt out. Peter, it's late in the day so I'll be quick. I was just going over the numbers ahead of our major fundraising deadline at midnight, and we are still trying to catch up in the MUST WIN Texas Special Election Runoff. Look, I'm not the kind of guy who normally asks for help like this -- but we truly have everything on the line in this race. We crunched the numbers and the crazy thing is, we are only 4 contributions short. Just 4. I won't mince words -- these runoffs are expensive, and our opponents are throwing everything at us. Winning this race will let us put the brakes on the disastrous Pelosi, Biden agenda. We know they've poured millions into Texas before and will stop at nothing to add this state into their column. That's why we need grassroots conservatives like you to help us before it's too late -- I can't thank you enough for your support in this race. name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Fighting Against Biden’s Reckless Energy Agenda
body:
| | | | Long lines at the gas pump, higher prices, and a tepid response from the Biden Administration.
---
---
Dear Peter,

subject: Press Release - Joe Kent Announces County Leadership for his Campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Joe Kent for Congress_
body:
Latest Press Release from Joe Kent | | | |
---
| | | **DATE: May 21, 2021**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: Byron Sanford ** **Cell: 360.210.6943**
[**byron@joekentforcongress.com**](mailto:byron@joekentforcongress.com)
---
|
####
# **Joe Kent Announces County Leadership for his Campaign**

---
| Battle Ground, WA— Today, Candidate Joe announced his County Chairmen and Coordinators in all eight counties within Washington’s Third Congressional District. He also announced the formation of Women for Joe Kent, led by Marie Emerson.

Candidate Joe made the following statement: “I am humbled by the outpouring of support throughout the district. Thank you to all our volunteers, and those serving as County Chairmen. It is also a pleasure to have Marie Emerson leading Women for Joe Kent. A majority of our volunteers are women, and they are found in all corners of the district.”

With 146 vetted volunteers, we are pleased to announce our County Chairmen, who are listed below.

**Klickitat** : Bob Songer. Sheriff of Klickitat. Refused to enforce the COVID lockdowns, and received the Constitutional Sheriff of the Year Award in 2019.

**Wahkiakum** : Jessie Westcott. Chairwoman of the Wahkiakum Republican Party.

**Clark** : Carolyn Crain. A PCO that introduced the resolution to censure Congresswoman Beutler in the Clark County GOP for the sham impeachment vote.

**Skamania** : Asa Leckie. Retired Green Beret from 1st Special Forces Group.

**Thurston** : Beverly York. A PCO. Worked in the prison system.

**Cowlitz** : Jim Darden. Programmer and small business owner.

**Lewis** : Linda Williams. A PCO for the past six years.

**Pacific** : Robert Waltemate. Small business owner.

Candidate Joe is available for interviews. If interested, please email Byron Sanford at [byron@joekentforcongress.com](mailto:byron@joekentforcongress.com) or via cell at 360.210.6943
